name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Breaking: Statistical Breakdown of Maricopa Fraud
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Here's what you need to know |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b0712e99e2&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

We are on the verge of cracking the case in Arizona. The Maricopa County Audit demonstrated beyond a shadow of a doubt that there was fraud in Arizona.

And I am writing you today with _statistical_ evidence that that is the case.

**My name is Mark Finchem. I am the proud Trump-endorsed Republican running for Secretary of State in Arizona and leading the vanguard of the biggest grassroots movement of the millennium – Election integrity.**

_And my background is in investigation and process. I am a former criminal investigator, first responder, and business owner with a Six-Sigma Certification._
Let me tell you why this is important. This is the key to understanding what happened in Maricopa.

_Investopedia_ defines the Six Sigma Certification as follows:

_The name Six Sigma has its origins in a statistical method of modeling a manufacturing process that is as free as possible of errors or defects. In statistics, six sigma indicates a likelihood of 3.4 defects per million things produced. This is the ultimate level to strive for, ensuring error-free delivery of a product 99.99966% of the time._

_Six Sigma training, therefore, focuses on the development of management processes that reliably lead to virtually defect-free results in manufacturing or in any business activity. It uses a number of statistical and data analysis tools to reach its objective._

“As free as possible of errors or defects.”

**Does that seem like our election in 2020 to you? Of course not. Now let me break down exactly how this type of Six-Sigma analysis plays out in Maricopa.**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=e2fb381fdd&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Think to yourself: _What does it take to reach 99.99966% error-free elections?_
To see where we are going, we must first ask where we have been. So let me highlight some key examples out of Maricopa which _in and of themselves_ are sufficient to identify significant sources of fraud.

**There was a .049047% margin in the election in Maricopa. This means that if the some of all potential sources of error which could attribute to a margin equal to or greater than .049047% means that the whole election is in jeopardy.**

**_If, however, there are any SINGLE sources of potential error that surpass the same margin, than this provides crystal clear evidence that the fraud goes far deeper than any of us had thought previously._**

Ok, so let’s break this down:
* 13.61% of ballots had corrupted images.
* 12.22% of Ballots didn’t receive any entry records
* 2.76% of ballots lacked legal provenance
* 1.65% ballots were illegally photocopied.
* 8.13% of voters votes were missing
* 1.43% of in person votes were recorded as mail in
* 14.36% of votes were potentially suppressed
* 1.64% were qualified as mixed bad votes
* 50.96% of election files were deleted.

Folks, with these kinds of numbers we can forget about the election being a “Six Sigma” election in terms of confidence in the election.

**This is why we must secure the ballot and eliminate potential sources of fraud. **

**_This is why I am pushing to establish additional ballot security practices, eliminate mail-in voting, and track down with intent to convict any perpetrators of _criminal_ wrongdoing in the election._**

We must audit the second largest county in Arizona and we are building a huge movement to make this happen. I have a petition with over 33,000 signatures (and growing!) to audit this critical county.

**We must also secure our state. We need someone who understands process engineering, who understands the statistical significance of the Democrats fraud, and who is capable of applying a Six Sigma approach to elections to guarantee the future of elections in Arizona, and elections in America.**

[And to do this I need your support. Our grassroots movement is growing, but we need all the help we can get.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a2ce03b214&e=44b8c466b0)

[_Please chip in with a donation of $25, $50, $100, or more today! Every dollar you donate will help bring us closer to protecting and locking down our elections in Arizona and around the Country._](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=78ceb4224b&e=44b8c466b0)

clean_body: Here's what you need to know | | | | | Dear , We are on the verge of cracking the case in Arizona. The Maricopa County Audit demonstrated beyond a shadow of a doubt that there was fraud in Arizona. And I am writing you today with statistical evidence that that is the case. My name is Mark Finchem. I am the proud Trump-endorsed Republican running for Secretary of State in Arizona and leading the vanguard of the biggest grassroots movement of the millennium – Election integrity. And my background is in investigation and process. I am a former criminal investigator, first responder, and business owner with a Six-Sigma Certification. Let me tell you why this is important. This is the key to understanding what happened in Maricopa. Investopedia defines the Six Sigma Certification as follows: The name Six Sigma has its origins in a statistical method of modeling a manufacturing process that is as free as possible of errors or defects. In statistics, six sigma indicates a likelihood of 3.4 defects per million things produced. This is the ultimate level to strive for, ensuring error-free delivery of a product 99.99966% of the time. Six Sigma training, therefore, focuses on the development of management processes that reliably lead to virtually defect-free results in manufacturing or in any business activity. It uses a number of statistical and data analysis tools to reach its objective. “As free as possible of errors or defects.” Does that seem like our election in 2020 to you? Of course not. Now let me break down exactly how this type of Six-Sigma analysis plays out in Maricopa. | | Think to yourself: What does it take to reach 99.99966% error-free elections? To see where we are going, we must first ask where we have been. So let me highlight some key examples out of Maricopa which in and of themselves are sufficient to identify significant sources of fraud. There was a .049047% margin in the election in Maricopa. This means that if the some of all potential sources of error which could attribute to a margin equal to or greater than .049047% means that the whole election is in jeopardy. If, however, there are any SINGLE sources of potential error that surpass the same margin, than this provides crystal clear evidence that the fraud goes far deeper than any of us had thought previously. Ok, so let’s break this down: 13.61% of ballots had corrupted images. 12.22% of Ballots didn’t receive any entry records 2.76% of ballots lacked legal provenance 1.65% ballots were illegally photocopied. 8.13% of voters votes were missing 1.43% of in person votes were recorded as mail in 14.36% of votes were potentially suppressed 1.64% were qualified as mixed bad votes 50.96% of election files were deleted. Folks, with these kinds of numbers we can forget about the election being a “Six Sigma” election in terms of confidence in the election. This is why we must secure the ballot and eliminate potential sources of fraud. This is why I am pushing to establish additional ballot security practices, eliminate mail-in voting, and track down with intent to convict any perpetrators of criminal wrongdoing in the election. We must audit the second largest county in Arizona and we are building a huge movement to make this happen. I have a petition with over 33,000 signatures (and growing!) to audit this critical county. We must also secure our state. We need someone who understands process engineering, who understands the statistical significance of the Democrats fraud, and who is capable of applying a Six Sigma approach to elections to guarantee the future of elections in Arizona, and elections in America. | God Bless You, | | Mark Finchem Arizona House of Representatives – District 11 Republican for Arizona Secretary of State Conservative Election Integrity Patriot P.S. I am trying to Audit Pima County. If you support my efforts, . PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE | | | Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved. name: Ed Humpheys
subject: It’s time for a fresh perspective to the problems facing Idaho
disclaimer_text: paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us
body:
| |
---

| |

| OCTOBER 8, 2021
---
[It’s time for a fresh perspective to the problems facing Idaho](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNzkzMDQ0NDU4MzQyNzE3NzI3JmM9eDlsNCZlPTAmYj03NTE0OTIxNzgmZD1rNWI4cTNs.oOgxgbpLkc_My-4IN-c6nCk_tIPlFMdvALn5RqLjvSU)
---
| |
---
|
---
---
---
| |
---
| |
---
We are gaining such massive momentum. For those of you who are new here, I'd love for us to get to know each other better. I'll go first... My story is similar to the stories of those who know the **American Dream** as more than a cute political talking point. Those of you who have been forged in the _crucible of adversity_ know how important difficulties in life are to **developing character**. Let me share with you what that means to me. First, you must know that the terror of socialism and communism was burned into my psyche from a tender age. My mother, brother, and aunt came to America from Eastern Europe (former Yugoslavia). _They lived under and fled from communism_. Growing up, I listened to stories of how people in other parts of the world lived and I was taught why **America is the greatest nation on Earth.** On my father’s side, my grandmother came to America from National Socialist (Nazi) Germany. Dad heard from my grandfather about the darkness covering Europe and his times in the U.S. Army during WWII. My grandmother has tearfully recounted and taught all of us how her country, along with Europe, was destroyed by socialists and communists. And how America served as a beacon of hope for the world. However, my personal experience with the **American Dream** isn’t founded on my family’s story alone. I was born in Arizona, and I grew up in (what most would call) meager circumstances. My mother learned English while cleaning hotel rooms, working in restaurants, and painting Native American art. My father worked tirelessly to support his family as a tile setter and granite fabricator. One thing I learned from my family is that in this land, _when you work incredibly hard and play by the rules, you can realize your dreams_. [Continue Reading ](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNzkzMDQ0NDU4MzQyNzE3NzI3JmM9eDlsNCZlPTAmYj03NTE0OTIxODEmZD1mNm0xbjFj.OxbGu_Wh_B-pFiIsBCQryi7Ov68jo4nOjszeVLpxW6s)
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| [Ada County Lincoln Day](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNzkzMDQ0NDU4MzQyNzE3NzI3JmM9eDlsNCZlPTAmYj03NTE0OTIxODQmZD1jN3UwdTln.qlJx4vWFhzUMMqW1_O5WReerRozQz-i9BV1dEDIL52g)
---
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| **The Ada County Lincoln Day Association** celebrates the memory and legacy of Abraham Lincoln with a banquet held each year in his honor. President Lincoln was instrumental in creating the Idaho territory and establishing this great state. I was honored to attend this year's Ada County Lincoln Day Banquet this past week. While I did not have the opportunity to meet with everyone I would have liked, I am incredibly grateful to see my supporters growing exponentially and the movement growing at such a rapid pace.
---
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNzkzMDQ0NDU4MzQyNzE3NzI3JmM9eDlsNCZlPTAmYj03NTE0OTIxODcmZD1nNno2bzdy.bO3yhiJTwqQrvT3mEKV0oVz3CXYN0SNN8Cu2p8MdPCE)
---
| [Ed On The Issues](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNzkzMDQ0NDU4MzQyNzE3NzI3JmM9eDlsNCZlPTAmYj03NTE0OTIxOTAmZD1yMWo3azJz.174CYLITsLleiDuYifwjhjcio4bU7KhyAITs0Hwtfvg)
---
We cannot solve problems with the same mentality that created them. The elitists measure success by growth. Growth in budgets, _growth in the size of government_. That growth is paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us. It’s time for a fresh perspective to the problems facing Idaho. I believe there are **timeless principles** that produce natural consequences. It’s time to put **principles** above politics. I will have one standard to measure success; promises kept.
| [Read more](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNzkzMDQ0NDU4MzQyNzE3NzI3JmM9eDlsNCZlPTAmYj03NTE0OTIxOTYmZD1tNmY1ejN1.MxHFbqDiZsg4gE-jTxqfQ-6dlFUHJ8u3mKiFbABy2J8)
---
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| |
---
| October 8
---
Pocatello, Idaho
Despite 44 degree weather and pouring rain, the Patriots in Pocatello gathered to hear Ed’s vision for the State of Idaho.
---
| |
---
| |
---
| October 8
---
Pocatello, Idaho
We were invited to tour the stunning Pocatello, Idaho Temple. The art in the Temple featured local scenery and local artists. Truly incredible and peaceful. It will be open to the general public for a few more weeks.
---
| |
---
| |
---
| October
---
Rigby, Idaho
Honoring for Hero’s backpacks given to LEOs and EMS/Fire after critical incidence. These provide them with resources for post trauma self care.
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| |
---
If you are like me, you know something is wrong right now. Please, join this growing movement. Volunteer. Host small gatherings in your home or community and I welcome the opportunity to attend and connect with fellow **Patriots.** Knock doors, make phone calls, write editorials, promote the movement on social media, etc. There are many ways to get involved. If you can’t volunteer, then I humbly ask for you to help us fundraise and donate. With your support we can forge a strong Idaho.
---
| |
---
| | [Join the Team](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNzkzMDQ0NDU4MzQyNzE3NzI3JmM9eDlsNCZlPTAmYj03NTE0OTIyMDImZD1mMXo3ZDh4.m50WxW2XOACdgyyCWrxjDslJ8wzhzKeNAUvZzhBWj-U)
---
---
| |
---
| Humphreys for Governor

subject: Fire Pelosi
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
I will always fight for our conservative principles in Washington DC. Find out more about how I'm working to help Take Back the House. | | | |
---
| | | Friend,

Nancy Pelosi KNOWS she's going to lose her majority in 2022, so **she's acting like she has nothing to lose.**

I've been on the front lines in Washington DC, while Democrats are in control of the House, Senate, and White House. We've seen it all.

The Democrats are **trying to destroy our election system through HR 1, they're trying to raise taxes on middle-class Americans, trying to force through cripplingly expensive Green New Deal proposals** , and the list goes on and on.

And it's only been a few months.
---
| We have seen crisis after crisis when Democrats are in charge. I want to return to common-sense Conservative values; the values that keep our families safe and happy, and allow our country to be prosperous and thrive.

Would you consider [donating now](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=036515fd2b&e=1050d051da) to help us Take Back the House?

_**I'm fighting for policies that will get our nation back on track:**_
* Co-Sponsor Constitutional Amendment for **Term Limits**
* Protect Our Country, **Build the Wall**
* Balance the Budget, **No Tax Increases**
* Fight for **Work Requirements and Drug Testing for Welfare Recipients**
* **Fight for Life** , Liberty, and the Pursuit of Happiness
* Fight to Ensure Kansas is Always Represented on the Ag Committee
* Live and Raise My Family in Kansas

---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=0e0e5365be&e=1050d051da)
---
| We need to Take Back the House and Fire Pelosi.

There are two things you can do that will really help us keep this seat **Red.**
1. [Donate now](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=7024474484&e=1050d051da). $100, $25, or even $5. Anything helps.
2. [Let the Democrats know you're on Team LaTurner for 2022](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=2ae724c3a5&e=1050d051da).

And I know how important this fight is. **I will not leave this nation in worse shape for my four young children than it was when I grew up. **

I became a Congressman to fight for them and everyone else in this nation who is falling victim to the Reckless Policies of the Radical Left.

I'm doing as much as I can in DC to fight for you, but I cannot do it alone. That is why I'm asking for your help to us Take Back the House in 2022.

Yours in the fight,

Jake LaTurner

name: Marcus Flowers
subject: We've got to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene -- will you help me do it?

My name is Marcus Flowers and I am an Army veteran running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and restore civility and common sense to our political discourse.

As someone who spent a decade of my life serving in war zones, I’m sick of seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene and the other leaders of the alt-right hijack the phrase "patriotism" to serve their own vile beliefs. I know patriotism -- and the reality is they’re the farthest thing from it.

**Through my work serving overseas on four continents, I’ve seen firsthand the damage done by radicalism, extremism, disinformation, lawlessness, and propaganda -- and after seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene bring her conspiracy theories and hatred to my home district? I knew I had to get in the race.**

[](https://eliforcolorado.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cirjdtd-ykykmujid-t/)

That’s 1 billion 400 million dollars PER PAGE!
**And did you hear Nancy Pelosi said, multiple times, that “it will cost $0”?**
Does she know how these things work? Maybe they don’t understand taxes.
**I wonder if Michael Bennet has read all 2,500 pages before doing what he always does - whatever the Democratic Establishment tells him to do - and votes yes?**
[**I’m sick of the political games. We need fiscal responsibility, common sense and economic leadership in Washington.**](https://eliforcolorado.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cirjdtd-ykykmujid-i/)
[**_Join me and donate $10 or $20 to fight back against self-interested, career politicians. Colorado needs someone with a backbone. That’s me. _**](https://eliforcolorado.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cirjdtd-ykykmujid-d/)

body:
Peter, will you back the badge with us and stand up for our law enforcement officers?
Peter,**Our campaign is proud to stand with our local law enforcement officials as they bravely and tirelessly work to protect and serve us and our communities.**

We admire their service and are proud to support them,_especially during a time when the Democrats and radical left are doing everything they can to discredit, defund, and dishonor them._ We need more support for our law enforcement personnel, not less. They took oaths to safeguard our communities. Let's return that respect by standing up for them.[**Donate to our campaign to ensure that a pro-police presence remains in Southeast Wisconsin and they are provided a voice in Congress.**](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zlllkil-idtjvlhlh-r/) On Wisconsin,Bryan

subject: A stake in the heart of Trumpism
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
Democrats could lose Virginia.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37356625/310830421/-2023814932?refcode=20211010.1_JC_10BT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzAyN2ZkNC1iMDI5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JqUmI0qAqWgbJ-33qGqiyfRZXhEWgQcoOEQimB-JRGE=)

| | Derek, In a moment, I’m going to ask you to [**make a matched donation to my friend Terry McAuliffe’s campaign to be Virginia’s next Governor.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37356626/310830422/1097049879?refcode=20211010.1_JC_10BT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzAyN2ZkNC1iMDI5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JqUmI0qAqWgbJ-33qGqiyfRZXhEWgQcoOEQimB-JRGE=) But before I do, I want to explain to you why Virginia is 2021’s most important race. The extreme Republican candidate running against Terry is Glenn Youngkin. Youngkin is a mega-millionaire who has Donald Trump’s “full endorsement.” It ain’t a mystery why Trump is all geeked up about Youngkin. Election experts are saying Democrats could lose Virginia. If that happens, Republicans would get a huge surge of momentum going into the 2022 midterms. So it’s this simple: If Glenn Youngkin wins, Donald Trump wins. Worse, Trumpism will be on the march again heading into a pivotal midterm for the future of our democracy. The good news is that Terry McAuliffe has what it takes to win. He’s tough, experienced, and has bold plans for Virginia that every single Democrat should be over the moon to support. Terry can win, but he’s going to need to build a historic grassroots team to pull it off. Youngkin has pledged spending up to $75 million of his own money to buy the Governor’s office for him and Trump. So here’s my ask: Let’s work our hearts out to make sure Terry McAuliffe wins the 2021 Virginia governor’s race. If we do that we put a stake in the heart of Trumpism once and for all. [**Will you make a matched donation to make sure Terry McAuliffe wins in Virginia? A Glenn Youngkin victory would be a disaster for the future of our country.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37356627/310830423/1097049879?refcode=20211010.1_JC_10BT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzAyN2ZkNC1iMDI5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JqUmI0qAqWgbJ-33qGqiyfRZXhEWgQcoOEQimB-JRGE=) Thanks, James Carville | [DONATE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37356628/310830424/-2023814932?refcode=20211010.1_JC_10BT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzAyN2ZkNC1iMDI5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JqUmI0qAqWgbJ-33qGqiyfRZXhEWgQcoOEQimB-JRGE=)

name: Roger L. Misso
subject: The difference between physical injury + psychological injury
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking the Hill
body:
Peter,

There is only one difference between physical and psychological injury: society has normalized treatment of the former, but not the latter.

Today is [_**World Mental Health Day**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/OnTzvspkPPOD8ajQi9tp21Ae_P9PZracoCKG3x6PB_c=/uL0SiyjCXFJOybSLYXoJrBR0G36FKv4PjO417RCG65k=), and it's an important time for reflection at [_**Taking the Hill**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/OnTzvspkPPOD8ajQi9tp21Ae_P9PZracoCKG3x6PB_c=/AutpgOIp-yVrhRg9L9uLTxJoPqsNV9hccy6s_ZKkSmM=). Ask any of our candidates, and they'll tell you that the first thing Secretary Murphy or I talk to them about isn't their fundraising, their polling, or their campaign infrastructure. [_**It 's about their mental health.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/OnTzvspkPPOD8ajQi9tp21Ae_P9PZracoCKG3x6PB_c=/uL0SiyjCXFJOybSLYXoJrBR0G36FKv4PjO417RCG65k=)

We ask them things like, [_**" Do you have a good mental health routine?"**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/OnTzvspkPPOD8ajQi9tp21Ae_P9PZracoCKG3x6PB_c=/uL0SiyjCXFJOybSLYXoJrBR0G36FKv4PjO417RCG65k=) and [_**" Do you have a therapist or a group of close contacts you can talk to throughout the campaign?"**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/OnTzvspkPPOD8ajQi9tp21Ae_P9PZracoCKG3x6PB_c=/uL0SiyjCXFJOybSLYXoJrBR0G36FKv4PjO417RCG65k=) We partner with The Headstrong Project to provide [_**free mental health care**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/OnTzvspkPPOD8ajQi9tp21Ae_P9PZracoCKG3x6PB_c=/uL0SiyjCXFJOybSLYXoJrBR0G36FKv4PjO417RCG65k=) to candidates and their staffs. We help them build mental resiliency into their campaign just as much as we help them raise money, hire staff, or recruit volunteers.

We like to say that we're working to elect veterans and military family members of integrity to Congress - and to keep them whole in the process. [_**Until we normalize and achieve universal treatment for both physical and psychological trauma, we will continue to live in a chronically injured world.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/OnTzvspkPPOD8ajQi9tp21Ae_P9PZracoCKG3x6PB_c=/uL0SiyjCXFJOybSLYXoJrBR0G36FKv4PjO417RCG65k=)And that's just not something we are willing to accept.

We hope you'll join us in reflection on this World Mental Health Day and consider [_**supporting our work**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/OnTzvspkPPOD8ajQi9tp21Ae_P9PZracoCKG3x6PB_c=/uL0SiyjCXFJOybSLYXoJrBR0G36FKv4PjO417RCG65k=) \- not just to help our candidates win, but to help them thrive as human beings throughout the process.

Yours in service,
Roger

Roger Misso
Executive Director
_**[Taking the Hill](https://act.myngp.com/el/OnTzvspkPPOD8ajQi9tp21Ae_P9PZracoCKG3x6PB_c=/duNzCzkcESKTfJn4diFbstQE4RhWqQmyKMdL_TbRLq8=)**_
To make a contribution, _**[click here](https://act.myngp.com/el/OnTzvspkPPOD8ajQi9tp21Ae_P9PZracoCKG3x6PB_c=/W5K3_R5yKpvm_BkPUTKaobDcoZHsra6i2idkKK9WRQg= "https://act.myngp.com/el/OnTzvspkPPOD8ajQi9tp21Ae_P9PZracoCKG3x6PB_c=/W5K3_R5yKpvm_BkPUTKaobDcoZHsra6i2idkKK9WRQg=").**_
Checks may be mailed to:
Taking the Hill PAC
PO Box 2134
Bristol, PA 19007

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Sign the No Forced COVID Vax Open Letter
body:
By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zumr909pp5knlqk736d1ug3k02mgmbas1c1h41ng_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c3hmcor2cph2bs) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA’s National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ze12c3pg937t9rvkbq50m10kea5gatfump2d8fpg_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c3hmcor2cph2bs) [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0pbman94114t7tpa2pflg374n39fsm7uvv3g380_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c3hmcor2cph2bs) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a **“NO FORCED VAX”** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zt02hcea8efo5mi21ff5ibhcau0cdlqa8lah2rqo_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c3hmcor2cph2bs) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students —the least affected by the disease — must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you’ll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zuvhe1m3aqm97eoce9afqmnhap1rlerl73lb8k9o_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c3hmcor2cph2bs) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zi8miaqrcip8tal7u0hp6inlabtfjflscvfn6tl0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c3hmcor2cph2bs) Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044

clean_body: By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal | Sponsored message | ---|---|--- Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has NO POWER to get involved in your medical decisions. PERIOD! But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are FORCING students to get the COVID vaccine... DEMANDING that they publicly share their medical history... and BANNING them from school if they don’t comply! My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a “NO FORCED VAX” campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. This move by the universities is not about vaccines AT ALL. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students —the least affected by the disease — must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his ONLINE college classes until he takes the vaccine! If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next! We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. Thank you for your support! name: Parents Defending Education
subject: Sign the declaration: Students over teachers' unions
body:
Like many parents, one Rhode Island mom wanted to know what her daughter would be taught in school. But now she’s the targ
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3uuppsj0mn39qtvfi8t77ps92n4aea7am0qkfho_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfaob1e9h3ad76curj2dj5eqrrdc34mdhned3j6mobbc3imkrracjmc2qrccbgsurt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0eapmcdj0mmq3fchjcooj1cj26pp238h1e8he4933cpj61or5c5j66oh5u)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zoo5ubr8gt24fn5a39fcqhkst76i7mu3g4aapjto_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c3hmaob6cdh2bs) Fellow American, Like many parents, one Rhode Island mom wanted to know what her daughter would be taught in school. But now she’s the target of a lawsuit from the National Education Association (NEA) — the largest teachers’ union in the country — just for asking questions. After enrolling her daughter in kindergarten, this mom asked the principal for more information about the curriculum. **She wanted to know what would be taught about Critical Race Theory (CRT) and gender identity.** The response? This Rhode Island mom says she was told to file public records (FOIA) requests to get the information she wanted. She filed FOIA requests ... **_and now a lawsuit from the NEA has followed._** **Teachers’ unions shouldn’t bully, intimidate, or silence concerned parents, community members, or groups like Parents Defending Education (PDE) that want to improve their kids’ education. ** **[If you agree, please click here to sign the declaration right now -- and join over 50,000 concerned parents and taxpayers who are standing up for a healthy, non-politicized education for our kids.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zeq52t4k754ueb7723rvpo0tq966f61gkjnguvs0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c3hmaob6cdh2bs)** [**Help Us Stand Against the NEA**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zeuk2am307o812bkh1e7um5tpom5unegjda77dco_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c3hmaob6cdh2bs) Parents Defending Education is a national grassroots organization working to reclaim our schools from activists promoting harmful agendas. Through network and coalition building, investigative reporting, litigation, and engagement on local, state, and national policies, we are fighting for the restoration of a healthy, non-political education for our kids. **Right now, teachers’ unions are a major roadblock to making that vision a reality, and it’s time for parents to start wielding the enormous power we possess to reclaim our schools.** [**You can take the first step right now by signing this national declaration.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7nnuulakl5ie0bibikq4sb0vitlc4n69qtqhkvg_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c3hmaob6cdh2bs) You and I both know there are many thousands of outstanding teachers across the country who work hard every day to educate students and put them on a path to lifelong success. They’re the teachers who inspire your kids’ love of reading ... or spark an interest in science that leads them to a rewarding career ... or provide the mentorship and support that changes their lives. But too often this year, you and I have seen teachers’ unions put politics ahead of students and classroom learning — and lash out against parents and groups like Parents Defending Education (PDE) for our involvement in our kids’ educations. At PDE, we’ve experienced this firsthand. This summer, the NEA passed a resolution at its annual conference to allocate more than $50,000 to “research” groups like Parents Defending Education. And although they used the word “research,” they really mean “investigate and smear.” If they thought this “cancel culture” tactic would intimidate us — they were wrong. We’re more committed than ever to defending a healthy, non-political education for all students. **[If you stand with PDE, as I believe you do, please add your name to this declaration to stand with students, parents, and classroom teachers over the political interests of teachers’ unions.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztp4243aoumm5kgal8hhjf4fchlg2e5khuh3uqsg_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c3hmaob6cdh2bs)** [**Help Us Stand Against the NEA**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpgvfmpb29nkgh9q4jetcvcl6hvis6oj13o1uj4o_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c3hmaob6cdh2bs) Thank you for your support. Nicole Neily President Parents Defending Education | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zobaq555ui9huiq71q9djaljbi5pia6nhc1ggseg_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c3hmaob6cdh2bs) | [](twitterhttps://twitter.com/defendinged?lang=en) | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znvrvor8eh69uc28t45te4gvourupkk62ps9kg10_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c3hmaob6cdh2bs) | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znr5cgssgvo7relp53idi39g168altt4802i9h18_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c3hmaob6cdh2bs) | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvoupmvus5om5s46pntvia2hif271gc70a83mph8_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c3hmaob6cdh2bs)
---|---|---|---|---

4532 Lee Hwy #119
Arlington VA 22207

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

| What I Believe:
---
1. I believe in parental choice.
2. I believe categorizing vociferous dissent as "[domestic terrorism](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ddnmuLMzeR-SZ1XhRjmEleNfETQGAgsbQ4oXJPpnMq8M0ulbc-4yx2qpcmKzXqQWTlZuJMlqrnaWFOUyip5q3NcwiwUU1XAv43Z0SmL9WfQ9s6_LR62PIFgcmUifZ9IvCyXlMUHA_JgPMfs7ajf9DEXkoouvIttPcqfMESWz-9pfWQHglK-jN_FMJ1E7Qx-vEcf_vubAknRPV3jBXYhTIe5fkCq2tpG3mulBzAHEBXdGxKVvk2NQzLKVMnys5YtFt-eADZb7bpO1d76qCg_KRZDzU7bKPS_HJa4C_zrAHSsB4TmPAGfwYQ==&c=6y08qqEbbwavJr7ESAee9gYW_X_9yr0rgroc5DRreLgdYTCZu_eCXA==&ch=mt2ytOyDCwfQPB7pNm1v9ZesBWRVrObqHHxjyvZd1JhG5zOEi9jlyw==)" is wrong and removes legitimate parental concerns from the realm of civic debate.
3. I believe parents have the right to see all books and materials used in classes taken by their children.
4. I believe it should be easy to vote and hard to cheat.
5. I support photo ID requirements and believe all mail-in ballots should be received by Election Day.
6. I believe in America's sovereignty and that our borders must be secured.
7. I believe the more than [10,000](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ddnmuLMzeR-SZ1XhRjmEleNfETQGAgsbQ4oXJPpnMq8M0ulbc-4yx2qpcmKzXqQWgHQfe-fK54BXCAo2eO2WDRnS2Ps3makK71I_81vz6iwg1psu5fCIkN5GDXNMk4EbktVBjvBeHljKf2T1kPZzDiIIpgNr5_jpWk2cNoAwNdirkxz-_a1BRU_bH8npr1SeA0Bxyu9V5yFt4SX0UOpyKbiGID7upVaziKfVLwfhW0fpk03dy7nGJl1rlrTqyPXWjqH627TebhY=&c=6y08qqEbbwavJr7ESAee9gYW_X_9yr0rgroc5DRreLgdYTCZu_eCXA==&ch=mt2ytOyDCwfQPB7pNm1v9ZesBWRVrObqHHxjyvZd1JhG5zOEi9jlyw==) pounds of fentanyl seized at our porous Southern borders during 2021 is a dangerous problem.
8. I believe in medical freedom.
9. I believe central to medical freedom is physical autonomy.
10. I believe we can do better than this Administration.

---
|
---

---
| "Our country is sitting on a knife's edge right now. This thing could really go either way. Democrats are engaged in a street fight. They have no intentions of allowing the pendulum to naturally swing our direction just because it's a midterm election and everything Biden touches fails. They have shown they will do anything to stay in control."

name: American Defense News
subject: Flawed and outdated?
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5e4pocre4hutrruviki8igr800mqq14b4qa6beo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbrb1cpj69pnacplmphjddr6cdpmbdj7m2obatjl61jj6dlhmep72dpnchh7actnmv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3imdj3collm1jreor662ob4ohme8gq48bi4bh28or6cpgeeo30spi649fg)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zockmairr8ips8rmbukc9509cm4to71thb7rh7qo_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c3jm0o76chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2znhbe561ot0jlaedbklrri1npb3dg2npekfuiv78_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c3jm0o76chh2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zphlisg4scci515vgb6tgafnqrp67a0bikghgkkg_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c3jm0o76chh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

clean_body: The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is flawed and outdated —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: The Federalist Papers. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, The Federalist Papers were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described The Federalist Papers as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ The Federalist Papers ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. “The Federalist Papers” course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of “The Federalist Papers” on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of “The Federalist Papers” today: Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Defense News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

| | Peter, GOP Gov. Brian Kemp just deployed his strategists to form a new group called Stop Stacey. They're using their deep political back channels throughout Georgia to keep Stacey Abrams from unseating Kemp in 2022. **ATLANTA JOURNAL-CONSTITUTION: "Abrams might sit the race out."** Last week Stacey Abrams flew to Texas, kicking off her nationwide tour firing up progressives ahead of next year's midterms. Meanwhile, Kemp's Stop Stacey operatives are hard at work securing big-dollar donations in Georgia to make sure Stacey's grassroots network can't compete with Kemp's machine in 2022. Stacey is the ONLY candidate capable of defeating Kemp & Co's fascist agenda to undermine our democracy with their authoritarian scheme. We have to protect her at all costs \-- and prove that progressives everywhere stand with Stacey. | **[STAND WITH STACEY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37371308/310864239/103943381?refcode=OUT_20211010_GEN_FDR_A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRkNjM4YjViLWQyMjktZWMxMS05ODFmLWM4OTY2NTNiOTIwOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cQxvOOmmSC4Zf6yqiHZf3W7pfSDdgjvCfsPy-2N3jSo=)**

name: Senate Majority Update
subject: Peter, you have to hear what's happening in Iowa
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
**Peter – if you care about Democrats protecting our Senate majority, you have to hear about what's happening in Iowa:**
**First:** Nearly two-thirds of Iowa voters said they DIDN'T want to reelect Sen. Chuck Grassley (R) – unprecedentedly bad numbers for the seven-term incumbent, and Democrats' best opportunity in _decades_ to flip this seat blue!
**Then:** Democrat Abby Finkenauer launched her campaign with a massive outpouring of grassroots support.
**Now:** **With Sen. Grassley more vulnerable than he's been in years, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to keep – and expand – our Senate control if we flip Iowa blue.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37371371/310864529/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk287-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTkzMzUwZi1kMzI5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nd3GegBB4N5dUvbU3WFkxBhI1w0-rpGoqPqBb4-blr0=)

Grassley and expand and protect our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37371373/310864531/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk287-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTkzMzUwZi1kMzI5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nd3GegBB4N5dUvbU3WFkxBhI1w0-rpGoqPqBb4-blr0=)**

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37374811/310875823/-793144256?refcode=dpva-em-211010-chase&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGM3NjJiZC1kYTI5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iaZCAkbiXt7mGkxuFzM2vU4CUYFX4OXlprgXF3c2bH4=&emci=2317c5eb-2529-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=fdc762bd-da29-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=15759664)

when I first launched my campaign for Senate more than 2 years ago. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miLT6s1e0rffPNCDDVLmL6Fvb2m0rvrlfkVGQYra75tVQaD9n3wqjOAn8xNszzDZpOasXX6EGMNJuR8BBDog3FIHD3GkzNpSxqSaxn15AUfCA1MdqnTTqLU08jP_WTbrtzsofHDATX3E7Gsbm4Bm2q28H6QkeEBerJ8IPPTEFqeEqPbjkEE736GpYg2fn9ZnHwmGrhhMtTwA0x3Yg976eFDyCUQntL1j0-FdGiHsyadYlR898tr9l15lYaAULFpJVeCb1SR4DxofIPTvKpL2rXFw/3g1/-y_Qox7pQpuHANdVVzUEXA/h0/kNuGKyALK_P8lkQIuHTqKFPZRRuQONVqRO_Ca8XaWeM)
Derek —

I remember when I first launched my campaign for Senate more than 2 years ago.

I wasn’t sure what to expect. One of my biggest concerns was whether or not we’d have the resources to win an expensive race with wild amounts of outside money spent to beat me.

But then, minutes after we announced, a teacher from Tucson made one of the first donations and we were off ...

**We’ve received hundreds of thousands of donations since then, funding our campaign with grassroots support that I’m very proud of. You should be too.**

Today, I’m asking if you can chip in. Our mid-month deadline is right around the corner and we’ve got a lot of ground to make up to reach our goals.

Can I count on you?

**[I’m humbly asking if you can split a $25 contribution between our campaign and Common Good VA before our mid-month fundraising deadline? John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

clean_body: We have to fill up the tank. | = = Look, It’s no secret that when you’re on a campaign, everything costs money. Whether it’s heading to the Summit County Fairgrounds to talk about legalizing marijuana or the Oktoberfest in Nevada, OH, running ads on Facebook so more and more Ohioans can join our grassroots movement, or just keeping the office stocked with coffee, the expenses add up. One of our biggest costs so far? Gas money. Take a look at some of the places we’ve been to in just the last few weeks. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = Appreciate your support, John = John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. Now, he's running for governor. name: Mondaire Jones
subject: We (still) need to abolish the filibuster
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

Last week’s conflict surrounding the debt ceiling underscored something we’ve known for a long time: we absolutely must abolish the filibuster if we are going to get anything done for working families.
[**I’ll give you a timeline of what happened in a moment, but first, please add your name here to say that you support abolishing the filibuster.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37377212/310883559/22363309?refcode2=27a4ddaa-df29-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&refcode=em211010-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2E0ZGRhYS1kZjI5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3yWsLvtirzJHD_p6tfpldGLZ5lX2T1_JYq8jXd9XVSY=&emci=74a461c2-dc29-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=27a4ddaa-df29-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=24719896)
Okay, here’s what you need to know:
* **September 28th:** Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen says that Congress must raise the debt ceiling by October 18th to avoid default. A default would mean millions of layoffs, pensioners not receiving their checks, and federal workers and members of the military receiving reduced compensation — or no compensation at all — for their work.
* **October 6th:** Senate Republicans choose to filibuster instead of allowing a vote on funding the government. This is the third time in two weeks that they refused to allow a vote.
* **October 8th:** 11 Republicans vote with Democrats to overcome the filibuster. The Senate passes a $480 billion deal 50-48 — _with not a single Republican voting yes_ — to fund the government through **December 3rd.**

Now, it’s a good thing that we avoided default in the short term.
But Mitch McConnell has already said that once December 3rd rolls around, Republicans will filibuster legislation to fund the government all over again. They’re playing politics with people’s lives, and they’ll continue this vicious cycle unless we abolish the filibuster.
[**Please, add your name here to say that you support abolishing the filibuster. Republicans will continue to block the passage of overwhelmingly popular legislation unless we act now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37377213/310883560/2071152334?refcode2=27a4ddaa-df29-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&refcode=em211010-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2E0ZGRhYS1kZjI5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3yWsLvtirzJHD_p6tfpldGLZ5lX2T1_JYq8jXd9XVSY=&emci=74a461c2-dc29-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=27a4ddaa-df29-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=24719896)
Now that the $480 billion package has passed the Senate, my colleagues and I in the House will vote to advance it, and then it will go to President Biden’s desk.
I’m pleased to report that we’re avoiding a default in the short term, but the truth is that Republicans will keep holding working people hostage for no good reason until we abolish the filibuster.
Thank you for reading,
Mondaire
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37377214/310883561/2071152334?refcode2=27a4ddaa-df29-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&refcode=em211010-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2E0ZGRhYS1kZjI5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3yWsLvtirzJHD_p6tfpldGLZ5lX2T1_JYq8jXd9XVSY=&emci=74a461c2-dc29-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=27a4ddaa-df29-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=24719896)**

clean_body: Last week’s conflict surrounding the debt ceiling underscored something we’ve known for a long time: we absolutely must abolish the filibuster if we are going to get anything done for working families. Okay, here’s what you need to know: September 28th: Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen says that Congress must raise the debt ceiling by October 18th to avoid default. A default would mean millions of layoffs, pensioners not receiving their checks, and federal workers and members of the military receiving reduced compensation — or no compensation at all — for their work. October 6th: Senate Republicans choose to filibuster instead of allowing a vote on funding the government. This is the third time in two weeks that they refused to allow a vote. October 8th: 11 Republicans vote with Democrats to overcome the filibuster. The Senate passes a $480 billion deal 50-48 — with not a single Republican voting yes — to fund the government through December 3rd. Now, it’s a good thing that we avoided default in the short term. But Mitch McConnell has already said that once December 3rd rolls around, Republicans will filibuster legislation to fund the government all over again. They’re playing politics with people’s lives, and they’ll continue this vicious cycle unless we abolish the filibuster. Now that the $480 billion package has passed the Senate, my colleagues and I in the House will vote to advance it, and then it will go to President Biden’s desk. I’m pleased to report that we’re avoiding a default in the short term, but the truth is that Republicans will keep holding working people hostage for no good reason until we abolish the filibuster. Thank you for reading, Mondaire | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 499 S. Capitol St. SW Suite 407 Washington, DC 20003 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. if you'd like to unsubscribe. body:
One of our founding furry members is turning 4 today, and we wanted to introduce you to him:
#

Today’s a special day here on Team Beasley! One of our founding furry members is turning 4 today, and we wanted to introduce you to him:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37383301/310887418/-572197399?refcode2=b8e1061b-e329-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&refcode=em211010-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGUxMDYxYi1lMzI5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aMzksEo74Hzo9vrIM9RZ9v5z5ajP6Epe_bCuiHiRC4U=)
Stanley Beasley joined the family as a puppy, and every morning when Cheri got up to serve the people of North Carolina as Chief Justice, he was with her ready to help his mom pursue justice and fairness for all.
Stanley knows how important it is that everyone’s voice is heard in our state. That’s why he’s always ready to bark up for the most important issues — like climate change to make sure everyone has access to clean air and water, a $15 minimum wage so no food bowl goes empty, and universal belly rubs.
Stanley knows we can all trust his mom to speak up for the people (and pets!) of our state in the Senate.
And when he heard his mom say that we’d have to work harder than ever, he let it be known he was ready. So instead of asking for treats for himself today, he’s hoping you’ll do something special for his mom.
[**Can you help Stanley celebrate his birthday by making a donation to his mom Cheri’s campaign for Senate today? This would be a big treat for Stanley, and we’ll make sure every dollar goes directly to powering this grassroots campaign to flip North Carolina in 2022.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37383304/310887432/-572197399?refcode2=b8e1061b-e329-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&refcode=em211010-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGUxMDYxYi1lMzI5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aMzksEo74Hzo9vrIM9RZ9v5z5ajP6Epe_bCuiHiRC4U=)
Thank you for pawsing to read this and celebrating Stanley with us!
-Team Beasley
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37383307/310887448/-572197399?refcode2=b8e1061b-e329-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&refcode=em211010-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGUxMDYxYi1lMzI5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aMzksEo74Hzo9vrIM9RZ9v5z5ajP6Epe_bCuiHiRC4U=)
P.S.
We’re still going to make sure Stanley gets lots of treats and belly rubs today for being such a good boy! But we know he’s still going to his mom if this email helped her campaign, so [**it would mean a lot to Stanley (and Cheri and all of us!) if you can pitch in today!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37383309/310887456/-572197399?refcode2=b8e1061b-e329-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&refcode=em211010-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGUxMDYxYi1lMzI5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aMzksEo74Hzo9vrIM9RZ9v5z5ajP6Epe_bCuiHiRC4U=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37383311/310887458/-572197399?refcode2=b8e1061b-e329-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&refcode=em211010-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGUxMDYxYi1lMzI5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aMzksEo74Hzo9vrIM9RZ9v5z5ajP6Epe_bCuiHiRC4U=)**

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: October is LGBTQ+ History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
This is a time to honor the brave activists who organized and fought for decades to make the American promise real for people like my fiancé Dr. Matt and me
#

Friend —
October is LGBTQ+ History Month, a time to honor the brave activists who organized and fought for decades to make the American promise real for people like my fiancé Dr. Matt and me.
And as I reflect on the powerful legacies of people like Marsha P. Thompson, Sylvia Rivera, and Harvey Milk, I can't help but be inspired by their strength and their bravery.
I truly believe the kind of courage it took for them to bleed and fight for the right to live as their authentic selves is contagious. I believe bravery begets bravery.
So it's on us to summon our own courage and continue the fight — and there is indeed much more work to be done.
Right now, we are in a position where it's more important than ever for working people and marginalized people to stand together to speak for ourselves — and to fight for ourselves.
I believe in my bones that if we're going to break down structures that perpetuate systemic discrimination and poverty in the LGBTQ+ community, we need to elect a new generation of leaders who know these struggles first-hand.
That's why I'm running. And if I have the honor of serving Pennsylvania as the first openly gay man and the first LGBTQ+ person of color in the U.S. Senate, no one will be a louder voice for the issues affecting our community.
[So, friend, in honor of LGBTQ+ Month, I'm asking you to be a part of our work to build a huge coalition of folks behind our movement. Will you pitch in $3 to help us build a campaign that can win and make history?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37383540/310887753/-360183459?refcode2=c8e1061b-e329-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&refcode=em211010-1-15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGUxMDYxYi1lMzI5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E3zMxtcRCpXbXucv_Cfr0j5End34JFEqkejAU8IXUAE=)

clean_body: This is a time to honor the brave activists who organized and fought for decades to make the American promise real for people like my fiancé Dr. Matt and me Friend — October is LGBTQ+ History Month, a time to honor the brave activists who organized and fought for decades to make the American promise real for people like my fiancé Dr. Matt and me. And as I reflect on the powerful legacies of people like Marsha P. Thompson, Sylvia Rivera, and Harvey Milk, I can't help but be inspired by their strength and their bravery. I truly believe the kind of courage it took for them to bleed and fight for the right to live as their authentic selves is contagious. I believe bravery begets bravery. So it's on us to summon our own courage and continue the fight — and there is indeed much more work to be done. Right now, we are in a position where it's more important than ever for working people and marginalized people to stand together to speak for ourselves — and to fight for ourselves. I believe in my bones that if we're going to break down structures that perpetuate systemic discrimination and poverty in the LGBTQ+ community, we need to elect a new generation of leaders who know these struggles first-hand. That's why I'm running. And if I have the honor of serving Pennsylvania as the first openly gay man and the first LGBTQ+ person of color in the U.S. Senate, no one will be a louder voice for the issues affecting our community. = = It means so much to have your support. Thanks for everything you do. All my best, Malcolm * Paid for by Malcolm PAC Malcolm PAC PO Box 22395 Philadelphia, PA 19110 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but if you need to, to unsubscribe. By submitting your mobile number, you agree to receive periodic campaign updates from Malcolm PAC. Msg & data rates may apply. Text HELP for more info, STOP to stop receiving messages.

name: Mark Kelly for Senate
subject: Give us a chance to explain please
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
The closest county in the state was Yuma County: “The Gateway to the Great Southwest” and home to the Somerton Tamale Festival, which they say is “the Woodstock of tamale events.”
#

Friends —
In just a moment, we are going to ask you to make a contribution to Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign. But before we do, please give us a chance to explain exactly why your donation is needed to help Mark win.
In 2020, Mark won Arizona by about 2.4 percent in a year with record turnout.
The closest county in the state was Yuma County. Yuma is known as “The Gateway to the Great Southwest” and home to the Somerton Tamale Festival, which they say is “the Woodstock of tamale events.”
In 2020, Mark lost Yuma County by less than 1,500 votes.
If Mark is going to win re-election in 2022, we’re going to need to keep it close, or win, in places like Yuma County.
So we’re asking for your help: We’re assigning people a county to help us raise what we need to win there — and you got Yuma:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution as a sponsor to Mark’s re-election campaign in Yuma County to help ensure we have the resources we need to win there and in all of Arizona’s 15 counties?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-oct21?refcode=em211010-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=1499_6688874_a6qlHL&akid=1499%2E6688874%2Ea6qlHL)
**We chose you to sponsor our campaign in Yuma County. Can you contribute $3 to help Mark win there in 2022?**
**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**County:** Yuma
**Suggested Donation:** [**$3**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-oct21?refcode=em211010-1-subs&t=2&refcode2=1499_6688874_a6qlHL&akid=1499%2E6688874%2Ea6qlHL)
**[YES, I can contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-oct21?refcode=em211010-1-subs&t=3&refcode2=1499_6688874_a6qlHL&akid=1499%2E6688874%2Ea6qlHL)**
If everyone who receives this email contributes, we’ll have the resources to carry Yuma County and be well on our way to re-electing Mark.
But not everyone does contribute, so that makes it ESPECIALLY important that you do.
[**Contribute $3 to help Mark win Yuma County and win re-election in 2022.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-oct21?refcode=em211010-1-subs&t=4&refcode2=1499_6688874_a6qlHL&akid=1499%2E6688874%2Ea6qlHL)
Thank you,
Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=1499%2E6688874%2Ea6qlHL).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Peter Franchot
subject: My Friend, Mayor Jake Day
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Dear Peter,
Today, I am honored and humbled to share with you our latest endorsement video featuring my good friend, Salisbury Mayor Jake Day.
Jake is one of Maryland’s most innovative and dedicated public servants. As a member of the National Guard recently deployed overseas, Jake has fought for our state and nation in more ways than one. I’m honored to have received Jake’s endorsement -- but I’m even more honored to call him my friend. I look forward to working with him closely not just to secure a stronger future for the great city of Salisbury, but to make Maryland the leading state in the nation under my gubernatorial administration.
You can learn more about why he’s endorsing me by viewing our newly released video below:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jakedayendorsement?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jakedayendorsement?amount=20.22]If I’m blessed to be your next Governor, I’m going to partner with leaders like Jake to lift our communities into the quality of life they deserve. My bold vision for the future of our state includes creating 100,000 new jobs in industries of the future, making Maryland the first net zero state in the nation, combating the student debt crisis, and so much more. We’re going to make sure that government gets the basics right for our working families -- including picking up trash and filling potholes on state roads, and answering all calls to state agencies within 60 seconds with a live and friendly voice who’s there to help.
I’ve also released a concrete plan to achieve economic, political, and social equity for Black Marylanders, and I am committed to selecting a Black woman as my running mate so that we can make sure all communities have a seat at the table.
We have a real shot at changing the way that government does business in 2022. But we can only do it with your help. This election could be the most expensive election in our state’s history, and I need your help to make sure that our campaign doesn’t fall behind. If you are able to give, will you support my campaign so that we can keep meeting our fundraising goals? We’re looking to get 50 new grassroots donations before 11:59 PM tonight.
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jakedayendorsement?amount=10] CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jakedayendorsement?amount=20.22] CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jakedayendorsement?amount=50] CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jakedayendorsement?amount=100] CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jakedayendorsement]I can’t thank you enough for your continued support of this movement. In the weeks and months to come, I will continue traveling across the state to share my bold vision for our future with voters. I hope to see you on the campaign trail with me.
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jakedayendorsement?amount=20.22]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/d3742435-b61b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed/9c980982-eb29-ec11-981f-c896653b9208?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Yzk4MDk4Mi1lYjI5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2b2c1UD6tyOinYH2P7YGix8GcksroPfySrxbfLfdHdI=&id=136194660 .
We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

**[Sign our petition now to demand a more transparent process>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37386382/310897578/1406662970?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Zjk4MDk4Mi1lYjI5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kptAIjqb3UtUFm2vwBmss_A-HTqU157Bih6Ap2sMimo=&emci=eeb08d2b-4728-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=9f980982-eb29-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=1049176)**

> North Carolina’s redistricting committees have begun meeting to start the process of drawing new legislative maps. We need them to know from day one that we _demand_ a fair, transparent, and nonpartisan process — _unlike last time._
> Although the committees held a series of public hearings _before_ they began drawing maps, there isn’t yet a plan to hold a similar series _after_ the maps are released. **We think this is unacceptable.**
> **[North Carolinians deserve to be heard. > ---
> This can’t be a repeat of last time. Back in 2019, our old legislative maps got thrown out in court for their blatant partisan gerrymandering that gave some voters more of a say in our elections than others.
> Peter, we can bet that Republicans in the legislature will take every opportunity to conduct this redistricting process _without_ meaningful public input — **that’s the only way they’ll be able to gerrymander the maps in their favor yet again.**

body:
I need your immediate attention.

-- Trump just held his BIGGEST rally since leaving office
-- He threatened to run for President if Republicans retake my House
-- And he just revealed Republicans can regain the Senate, too!

name: Candace Owens
subject: [Petition] NO vaccine passports >>
body:
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58498477:Jpm_cv2NH:m:1:3253819041:D95ED0686466FAFAA750B3F358D6E67D:r)
---
| Peter,
---
| California Democrat Sen. Dianne Feinstein is pushing new legislation that would **REQUIRE VACCINE PASSPORTS to fly on a plane.**

**_[Sign the petition to tell Congress: NO vaccine passports in America ever.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58498477:Jpm_cv2NH:m:1:3253819041:D95ED0686466FAFAA750B3F358D6E67D:r "Sign the petition to tell Congress: NO vaccine passports in America ever.")_**
---
| | | [SIGN NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58498477:Jpm_cv2NH:m:1:3253819041:D95ED0686466FAFAA750B3F358D6E67D:r)
---
| If the far-Left has their way, **unvaccinated Americans will be _stripped_ of the right to:**
* **Work** for a living,

* Attend our nation's public **schools** ,

* Visit local **businesses** ,

* And now,**travel on a plane** to visit loved ones.

**And _vaccinated_ Americans will be forced to **show their papers at every corne** r to access basic freedoms, like in a totalitarian dictatorship.

body:
Hey there --

We wanted to make sure you didn't miss Karen's BIG news: She's running to be Los Angeles' next mayor.

In the middle of a financial and public health crisis, it's time the people of Los Angeles have a progressive voice fighting for them in City Hall. Karen is ready to be that voice.

**[Will you take Karen's short survey to let her know what your TOP priorities are for our city? Share your thoughts now »](https://act.myngp.com/el/LQHaMP5Cl2zvoH-P3wtBAuCQWGu2Lwn8E1m5w1nb2g8=/kic0UzpGwOYQYlCpGWMCziJJlu4vxO9-aTFOotlwdeE=?ms=em21_211010_survy_esrv_gq_act___kbfm_ettx_alask1&refcode=em21_211010_survy_esrv_gq_act___kbfm_ettx_alask1&source=em21_211010_survy_esrv_gq_act___kbfm_ettx_alask1&utm_campaign=em21_211010_survy_esrv_gq_act___kbfm_ettx_alask1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)**

**Which of these issues is most important to you right now? (Check all that apply)** COVID-19 recovery
Affordable housing
Homelessness
Education
Criminal justice
Jobs & wages
Small business relief
Child welfare
Environment
Racial justice
Health care
Immigration
Other
| [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.myngp.com/el/LQHaMP5Cl2zvoH-P3wtBAuCQWGu2Lwn8E1m5w1nb2g8=/kic0UzpGwOYQYlCpGWMCziJJlu4vxO9-aTFOotlwdeE=?ms=em21_211010_survy_esrv_gq_act___kbfm_ettx_albbt1&refcode=em21_211010_survy_esrv_gq_act___kbfm_ettx_albbt1&source=em21_211010_survy_esrv_gq_act___kbfm_ettx_albbt1&utm_campaign=em21_211010_survy_esrv_gq_act___kbfm_ettx_albbt1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)
---

From community organizing in South Los Angeles and California's statehouse to the halls of Congress, Karen is ready to take her commitment to social and economic justice to fight on behalf of the city she grew up in. But she can't do it alone -- she needs to hear directly from the people she wants to serve.

We can't afford to stay silent on the issues that matter to us. **[Tell Karen what your TOP priorities are for our city. Take the survey now»](https://act.myngp.com/el/LQHaMP5Cl2zvoH-P3wtBAuCQWGu2Lwn8E1m5w1nb2g8=/kic0UzpGwOYQYlCpGWMCziJJlu4vxO9-aTFOotlwdeE=?ms=em21_211010_survy_esrv_gq_act___kbfm_ettx_alask2&refcode=em21_211010_survy_esrv_gq_act___kbfm_ettx_alask2&source=em21_211010_survy_esrv_gq_act___kbfm_ettx_alask2&utm_campaign=em21_211010_survy_esrv_gq_act___kbfm_ettx_alask2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)**

In solidarity,

Karen Bass for Mayor

Karen is building a grassroots campaign by and for the people of LA. Thanks to LA's matching funds program, donations from residents up to $214 may be matched 6-to-1 by the city, meaning your $5 contribution could become $35. Rush a donation today to support Karen's campaign:
[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://act.myngp.com/el/LQHaMP5Cl2zvoH-P3wtBAuCQWGu2Lwn8E1m5w1nb2g8=/q3qTsmTJGbeztUVwewlW3hvE_eyjG9Cvy78rqT39wcs=?ms=em21_211010_survy_esrv_gq_act___kbfm_ettx_alftr&source=em21_211010_survy_esrv_gq_act___kbfm_ettx_alftr&utm_campaign=em21_211010_survy_esrv_gq_act___kbfm_ettx_alftr&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)
