name: Derek Marshall
subject: We will not back down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
On Thursday, an anti-mask protest was scheduled at a local school board in my district. They claimed their protest wasn’t about “left vs. right” or “vaxxed vs. unvaxxed,” but was for “all Americans.”

**Recently, it came to my attention that this vocal Trump backed group has been bullying school officials, parents, and has been putting folks' lives in danger by refusing to mask up at meetings.** They harassed school board members tasked with the crucial responsibility of protecting our children.

They may be organized, but so are we. On Thursday, we showed up at a counter-protest to show them exactly that. **In short, we refused to allow this loud mouthed anti-mask cult to go unchallenged.**

**[That’s why it’s so important that our campaign is out here doing the work to make sure we face them head-on. Your contribution helps us stay strong so we can continue to show up for our community. Can you chip in to help?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37391016/310911750/-1802129319?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWVhM2Q3MC1mYTI5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a_EZD-S-_XMcJG_Gtw6SFj-ON29EBjO0bK6Bu2ZM3-8=)**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37391017/310911751/1198319198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWVhM2Q3MC1mYTI5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a_EZD-S-_XMcJG_Gtw6SFj-ON29EBjO0bK6Bu2ZM3-8=)

Here’s the thing. They were right. Their demonstration wasn’t about left vs. right, because their anti-masking endangers all people, regardless of political affiliation.**And let’s be clear: they may be a vocal minority, but they are just that—the minority. **

The thing about California’s 8th district is that while the GOP has had its grip on us for years, our district is getting younger and bluer as more folks move out of LA and into our communities.**So while these Trumpian anti-maskers act like they control our district, we actually have the numbers on our side. **

There are thousands of Democrats out there waiting to be registered, and when we reach them, we will liberate this district from out of the hands of problematic and divisive Republicans. **Moments of solidarity like this, when our community members show up together to stand against hatred and ignorance, make me incredibly proud to be in California’s 8th district. **

**[I know we have a long road ahead of us to victory, but if we stand together like this, I know we can and will win. Can you chip in $15, $25, or $50 today so we can stay strong?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37391018/310911752/-1802129319?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWVhM2Q3MC1mYTI5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a_EZD-S-_XMcJG_Gtw6SFj-ON29EBjO0bK6Bu2ZM3-8=)**

In Solidarity,
**Derek Marshall**

This team isn’t new to a tough fight. _Our grassroots movement defied the odds and elected Nevada’s first Democratic governor in two decades._
And since then, we’ve taken every chance to grow opportunity in our state by passing a public health insurance option, standing with unions, expanding women’s rights, and making it easier to vote.
But national Republicans have doubled down on flipping Nevada back to red these past three years.
In 2020, Donald Trump used his platform to personally attack me for implementing mail-in voting and followed up with bogus lawsuits in an attempt to undermine the election results. And right-wing super PACs have already spent millions of dollars attacking Nevada Democrats this year alone.
**We can change the course of this race by doing what we do best:** coming together and demanding a stronger Nevada.
**_[Team, will you chip in to my re-election campaign and help me defend the progress we’ve made together? clean_body: | | | | | Folks, this is urgent. The first poll for my re-election race was just released and take a look at the numbers... | | BREAKING: NEW POLL STEVE SISOLAK: 45.8% DEAN HELLER: 43.3% | | There’s no doubt: Nevada has always been a Battleground State, but this shows we’re facing our toughest fight yet. We’re within single digits of losing every bit of progress we’ve made. | | | | | | | | | | | | This team isn’t new to a tough fight. Our grassroots movement defied the odds and elected Nevada’s first Democratic governor in two decades. And since then, we’ve taken every chance to grow opportunity in our state by passing a public health insurance option, standing with unions, expanding women’s rights, and making it easier to vote. But national Republicans have doubled down on flipping Nevada back to red these past three years. In 2020, Donald Trump used his platform to personally attack me for implementing mail-in voting and followed up with bogus lawsuits in an attempt to undermine the election results. And right-wing super PACs have already spent millions of dollars attacking Nevada Democrats this year alone. We can change the course of this race by doing what we do best: coming together and demanding a stronger Nevada. | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for your support, Steve | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor P.O. name: Susan
subject: World Mental Health Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
Now more than ever, it is important that you know that you are not alone.

| Hi Peter,

Today is World Mental Health Day, an opportunity to raise awareness of the mental health challenges so many people face in our country and around the world.

Having lost a close family member to suicide in 2019, this is a subject that is near and dear to my heart. I have learned that mental health challenges and suicide prevention are of critical importance to so many in our country. I feel it is critical to use my platform to raise awareness around the growing mental health crisis in this country.

Over the past 18 months, as we faced physical distancing and isolation due to the coronavirus pandemic, it has been especially important to take care of our mental as well as physical health. We need to make sure we are looking out for those around us, as well as taking care of our own needs.

Now more than ever, it is important that you know that you are not alone. **I encourage you to utilize the resources available through the American Foundation for Suicide Prevention[ _on their website._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37392280/310915950/338145251?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDRmZWVmMS1mZDI5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0O9R4CQETmAHgK-0NpAtSxT_eYi5qBRCs1b38y7Mkjc=&emci=6e26bfc4-f229-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=004feef1-fd29-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=5543981)**

**If you or someone you know is experiencing a mental health crisis, trained professionals are available to support you 24 hours a day, 7 days a week by phone at 800-273-TALK (8255) or by texting TALK to 741741.**

We need to break down the stigmatization of mental health issues and care. I have and will work for a future without shame and without barriers to care, where everyone who needs support can get it. I know that this is possible and I hope that you will join me in this charge. These times may be tough, but we are in this together.

Stay safe and healthy,
Susan
---

Arizona is not West Virginia. We don’t need a Senator who sides with Trump’s Republican allies in the Senate against Joe Biden’s agenda — all while Biden won the state in 2020.

Friends -
Last week, as the country waited to hear if Kyrsten Sinema would support the Biden administration’s reconciliation bill, she was sharing her thoughts at a high-dollar fundraiser with business interests opposed to the legislation.
This is the point.
Senator Sinema takes huge donations from the pharmaceutical industry, and opposes legislation to lower prescription drug prices.
She meets with business interests, and opposes legislation to make them pay their fair share of taxes while voting against a minimum wage increase.
That’s why we’re calling on Ruben Gallego to primary her, and why we’re asking for you to contribute to his campaign so he has money on day one.
[**Can you please make a donation to our Draft Ruben Gallego fund? All donations will go directly to his U.S. Senate campaign the moment he files to run against Kyrsten Sinema.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37392695/310916945/-992818974?refcode=em121011-ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI1NzdhZTc1LTAwMmEtZWMxMS05ODFmLWM4OTY2NTNiOTIwOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=acm1-uBJpc1IWcU68bnkuijF4oRUcmHplNUq2zpChuc=)
Arizona is not West Virginia. We don’t need a Senator who sides with Trump’s Republican allies in the Senate against Joe Biden’s agenda — all while Biden won the state in 2020.
Run Ruben Run.
Chuck Rocha
Founder, Nuestro PAC

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Lawsuit over Biden China-Covid Cover Up
body:
CRT EXPOSED

[INSIDE JW]

RHODE ISLAND SCHOOL DISTRICT IS TRAINING TEACHERS IN CRITICAL RACE
THEORY

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56846&L=26022&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS9ZX2JBMG0ycDJKOD91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMTAxMDE1MzM1Mw==]

As the Justice Department and FBI targets innocent parents concerned
about critical race theory, Judicial Watch just received a 53-page
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56846&L=25988&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3Job2RlLWlzbGFuZC1jcnQtdGVhY2hlci10cmFpbmluZy1zZXB0ZW1iZXItMjAyMS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTEwMTAxNTMzNTM=]
training document from a whistleblower which details how public
schools are using teachers to push critical race theory in classrooms.

The training course for the Westerly School District in Rhode Island
was assembled by the left-leaning Highlander Institute
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56846&L=25989&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9oaWdobGFuZGVyaW5zdGl0dXRlLm9yZy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTEwMTAxNTMzNTM=]
and cites quotes from Bettina Love
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56846&L=25990&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9iZXR0aW5hbG92ZS5jb20vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjExMDEwMTUzMzUz],
from whom the Biden administration
distanced itself publicly after her statements equating
“whiteness” to oppression
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56846&L=25991&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmF0aW9uYWxyZXZpZXcuY29tL2Nvcm5lci9hYm9saXNoaW5nLWFtZXJpY2EtYmlkZW4tYW5kLWJldHRpbmEtbG92ZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTEwMTAxNTMzNTM=].

The document reveals the following:

* The training course for teachers, entitled “Culturally
Responsive & Sustaining Pedagogy” is taught by Vera De Jesus and
Michaela Comella, partners at the Highlander Institute, which has an
about section
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56846&L=25992&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9oaWdobGFuZGVyaW5zdGl0dXRlLm9yZy93b3JrLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMTAxMDE1MzM1Mw==]
on their website
that describes itself as:

Highlander Institute partners with communities to imagine and create
more equitable, relevant, and effective schools.

Highlander Institute is named after the Highlander Folk School, a
social justice leadership training school and cultural center located
in New Market, Tennessee known for its role during the Civil Rights
Movement.

* The training course claims that there are “unfortunate truths
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56846&L=26009&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3Job2RlLWlzbGFuZC1jcnQtdGVhY2hlci10cmFpbmluZy1zZXB0ZW1iZXItMjAyMS1wZy01L13igJ0/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTEwMTAxNTMzNTM=
about the history of Rhode Island and the United States.
* The training course notes that there is “systemic inequity
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56846&L=25994&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3Job2RlLWlzbGFuZC1jcnQtdGVhY2hlci10cmFpbmluZy1zZXB0ZW1iZXItMjAyMS1wZy02L13igJ0/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTEwMTAxNTMzNTM=
that must be overcome in the school system.
* The training course asks teachers “How does systemic racism
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56846&L=25995&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3Job2RlLWlzbGFuZC1jcnQtdGVhY2hlci10cmFpbmluZy1zZXB0ZW1iZXItMjAyMS1wZy0xMC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTEwMTAxNTMzNTM=]
manifest
itself in the education experience for students?”
* The training course links
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56846&L=25996&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3Job2RlLWlzbGFuZC1jcnQtdGVhY2hlci10cmFpbmluZy1zZXB0ZW1iZXItMjAyMS1wZy0xMS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTEwMTAxNTMzNTM=]
to
a video called “Systemic Racism Explained
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56846&L=25997&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1ZckhJUUlPX2JkUV3igJ0mdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTEwMTAxNTMzNTM=
from Act.TV, a
far-left YouTube channel.
* The course instructs teachers to ask themselves, “How do I
challenge systemic inequity
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56846&L=25999&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3Job2RlLWlzbGFuZC1jcnQtdGVhY2hlci10cmFpbmluZy1zZXB0ZW1iZXItMjAyMS1wZy0xNy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTEwMTAxNTMzNTM=]
as
an educator?”
* The course goals are to “foster and sustain cultural pluralism
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56846&L=26000&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3Job2RlLWlzbGFuZC1jcnQtdGVhY2hlci10cmFpbmluZy1zZXB0ZW1iZXItMjAyMS1wZy0xOS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTEwMTAxNTMzNTM=],
ultimately for the purpose of social transformation.” Further, its
stated goal is to, “disrupt the impact of educational inequity and
empower students to transform their own lives, their communities, and
society.”

* The course highlights “A Framework for Culturally Responsive &
Sustaining Pegagogy
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56846&L=26001&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3Job2RlLWlzbGFuZC1jcnQtdGVhY2hlci10cmFpbmluZy1zZXB0ZW1iZXItMjAyMS1wZ3MtMjEtMzEvXeKAnT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMTAxMDE1MzM1Mw==
which includes:

* “Awareness” that “we all operate within an inequitable
system
* “Cognitive Development” where teachers “leverage students’
identities and interests ...” and “scaffold and develop
students’ thinking skills”
* “Critical Consciousness” where the goal is that students are
motivated to “critical action so they can transform their lives,
communities, and society.”

* The course teaches that teachers should focus on collectivism over
individualism.
* In order to promote collectivism, it states that teachers may have
to “gather information

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES PENTAGON FOR VIDEOS/PHOTOS OF AFGHANS CLINGING TO
OR FALLING FROM AIRCRAFT IN KABUL

Of course, the Biden administration is running from its Afghanistan
disaster, but we intend to hold them to account for the catastrophic
surrender.

We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the
Pentagon for videos and photos of Afghans clinging to or falling off
U.S. military aircraft at the Kabul airport. (_Judicial Watch v. U.S.
Department of Defense_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56846&L=25986&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9kLWFmZ2hhbmlzdGFuLWNvbXBsYWludC0wMjU0My8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTEwMTAxNTMzNTM=]
(No.
1:21-cv-02543)).

We sued after the Defense Department failed to respond to a basic FOIA
request for:

Images, including video, showing Afghans clinging to the sides of a
U.S. military aircraft at the airport in Kabul, Afghanistan;

Images, including video, of persons falling from a U.S. Air Force C-17
military transport aircraft after taking off from the airport in
Kabul, Afghanistan.

Human remains were found in the wheel well of a C-17 aircraft that had
taken off from Kabul. According
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56846&L=25987&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vcG9saXRpY3MvaHVtYW4tcmVtYWlucy13ZXJlLWRpc2NvdmVyZWQtaW4tdGhlLXdoZWVsLXdlbGwtb2YtdGhlLWMtMTctYWZ0ZXItaXQtbGFuZGVkP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjExMDEwMTUzMzUz]
to
the Air Force, “Before the aircrew could offload the cargo, the
aircraft was surrounded by hundreds of Afghan civilians who had
breached the airport perimeter. Faced with a rapidly deteriorating
security situation around the aircraft, the C-17 crew decided to
depart the airfield as quickly as possible. In addition to videos seen
online and in press reports, human remains were discovered in the
wheel well of the C-17 after it landed at Al Udeid Air Base, Qatar.
The aircraft is currently impounded to provide time to collect the
remains and inspect the aircraft before it is returned to flying
status.”

Biden’s Afghanistan surrender was an unmitigated disaster that
directly killed and placed in harm’s way our troops and U.S.
citizens. And no one will ever forget the images of Afghanis falling
from and clinging to our military aircraft. Adding to the Afghan
scandal, photos and video of this disaster are now being hidden,
contrary to the law, from the American people.

And I trust you know that this lawsuit will likely be the first of
many as we seek accountability on what I consider to be the most
humiliating defeat in American history.

JAIL FOR BANGLADESHI SMUGGLER CAUGHT AMID RISE IN MIGRANTS FROM
TERRORIST NATIONS

Biden’s border crisis has been good business for transnational
criminals and the human trafficking operations they run. One such
criminal has been apprehended and sent to jail, as our _Corruption
Chronicles_ blog reports
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56846&L=26011&F=T&].

A Bangladeshi man based in Mexico has been sentenced to 46 months in
prison
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56846&L=26012&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3Yvb3BhL3ByL21hbi1zZW50ZW5jZWQtcm9sZS1pbnRlcm5hdGlvbmFsLWh1bWFuLXNtdWdnbGluZy1jb25zcGlyYWN5P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjExMDEwMTUzMzUz]
for
operating an “international human smuggling conspiracy” during a
period in which the U.S. saw a spike in migrants from terrorist
nations entering the country through the famously porous southern
border. The smuggler, 41-year-old Mohamad Milon Hossain, lived in
Tapachula in the southeast Mexican state of Chiapas bordering
Guatemala. For years Hossain assisted human smugglers operating out of
Bangladesh, South and Central America as well as Mexico to “bring
numerous undocumented individuals to the U.S. border in exchange for
payment,” according to federal documents
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56846&L=26012&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3Yvb3BhL3ByL21hbi1zZW50ZW5jZWQtcm9sZS1pbnRlcm5hdGlvbmFsLWh1bWFuLXNtdWdnbGluZy1jb25zcGlyYWN5P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjExMDEwMTUzMzUz].

The Bangladeshi smuggler maintained a hotel in Tapachula where illegal
immigrants would stay on their way to the U.S., federal authorities
say. He then provided the migrants with plane tickets and other tools
so they could travel from Tapachula to Monterrey in the northeastern
Mexican state of Nuevo León where a fellow smuggler took over and
assisted their illegal crossing into the U.S. “Hossain was a key
facilitator and smuggler of Bangladeshi nationals and his actions put
our national security at risk,” said Shane Folden, the Homeland
Security Investigations (HSI) special agent in charge in San Antonio,
Texas, where the case was cracked. Folden added that “HSI is
committed to working with its domestic and international partners to
combat this type of crime throughout the globe.”

When Hossain got arrested in late 2019 migrants from terrorist nations
were trying to enter the United States through Mexico at record rates.
At the time an alarming congressional investigation
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56846&L=11806&F=T&drurl=aHR0cDovL29wZW5jZGEuY29tL3dwLWNvbnRlbnQvdXBsb2Fkcy8yMDE5LzAxLzM5NjcwNTYzMS1TSUEtUmVwb3J0LTIwMTgucGRmP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjExMDEwMTUzMzUz]
exposed
an astounding 300% increase in Bangladeshi nationals attempting to
sneak into the country through Texas alone. The feds apprehended
Hossain after arriving on a flight at George Bush Intercontinental
Airport in Houston. He was charged with smuggling 15 illegal aliens
from Bangladesh through the Texas-Mexico border in exchange for
payment from March 2017 to August 2018. An accomplice, stationed in
Monterrey, where the aliens would stay before the last leg of their
trek to the United States, has pleaded guilty for his role in the
illicit scheme. The feds say he paid drivers to transport the aliens
to the U.S. border and gave them instructions how to cross the Rio
Grande River.

In the last few years Bangladesh has had a greater presence in the
Mexican border region though Syria and Yemen are also well
represented. Bangladesh is a South-Asian Islamic country well known as
a recruiting ground for terrorist groups such as the Islamic State of
Iraq and Syria (ISIS) and Al-Qaeda Indian Subcontinent (AQIS). The
smuggling operation run by Hossain is part of a broader crisis
involving a growing demographic of illegal aliens from terrorist
nations entering the U.S. through the Mexican border. The government
classifies them as Special Interest Aliens (SIA) and they are flowing
north via Latin America in huge numbers, thanks to established
Transitional Criminal Organizations (TCO) that facilitate travel along
drug and migrant smuggling routes. Tens of thousands of SIAs—from
the Middle East, Asia, and Africa—entered Panama and Colombia in
recent years. Nearly all the SIA migrants were headed to the United
States and most came from Syria, Pakistan, Afghanistan, Somalia,
Bangladesh, and India. Encounters with the special interest
individuals resulted in the seizure of tens of thousands of fraudulent
documents—including passports and visas—that facilitated travel
from their countries of origin through the Americas, the previously
cited congressional probe
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56846&L=11806&F=T&drurl=aHR0cDovL29wZW5jZGEuY29tL3dwLWNvbnRlbnQvdXBsb2Fkcy8yMDE5LzAxLzM5NjcwNTYzMS1TSUEtUmVwb3J0LTIwMTgucGRmP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjExMDEwMTUzMzUz]
found.

Years ago Judicial Watch, as part of an ongoing investigation into the
national security threats created by the porous southern border,
uncovered
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56846&L=16146&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY29ycnVwdGlvbi1jaHJvbmljbGVzL2NhcnRlbHMtY29ycnVwdGlvbi10ZXJyb3Jpc20tYW4taW52ZXN0aWdhdGlvbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTEwMTAxNTMzNTM=]
that
Mexico is a hotbed of Islamic terrorism. Islamic jihadists are
training in southern border towns near American cities and have joined
forces with Mexican drug cartels to infiltrate the United States. A
few years ago, a high-ranking Homeland Security official confirmed
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56846&L=26013&F=T&]
to
Judicial Watch that Mexican drug traffickers help Islamic terrorists
stationed in Mexico cross into the U.S. to explore targets for future
attacks. Among the jihadists that traveled back and forth through the
southern border was a Kuwaiti named Shaykh Mahmood Omar Khabir, an
ISIS operative who lives in the Mexican state of Chihuahua not far
from El Paso. Another was a Saudi Al Qaeda operative, Adnan G. El
Shurkrjumah, wanted by the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI)
during his undetected cross-border jaunts.

clean_body: CRT EXPOSED [INSIDE JW] RHODE ISLAND SCHOOL DISTRICT IS TRAINING TEACHERS IN CRITICAL RACE THEORY [==] As the Justice Department and FBI targets innocent parents concerned about critical race theory, Judicial Watch just received a 53-page [=] training document from a whistleblower which details how public schools are using teachers to push critical race theory in classrooms. The training course for the Westerly School District in Rhode Island was assembled by the left-leaning Highlander Institute [=] and cites quotes from Bettina Love [], from whom the Biden administration distanced itself publicly after her statements equating “whiteness” to oppression [=]. The document reveals the following: The training course for teachers, entitled “Culturally Responsive & Sustaining Pedagogy” is taught by Vera De Jesus and Michaela Comella, partners at the Highlander Institute, which has an about section [==] on their website that describes itself as: Highlander Institute partners with communities to imagine and create more equitable, relevant, and effective schools. Highlander Institute is named after the Highlander Folk School, a social justice leadership training school and cultural center located in New Market, Tennessee known for its role during the Civil Rights Movement. The training course claims that there are “unfortunate truths [= about the history of Rhode Island and the United States. The training course notes that there is “systemic inequity [= that must be overcome in the school system. The training course asks teachers “How does systemic racism [=] manifest itself in the education experience for students?” The training course links [=] to a video called “Systemic Racism Explained [= from Act.TV, a far-left YouTube channel. The course instructs teachers to ask themselves, “How do I challenge systemic inequity [=] as an educator?” The course goals are to “foster and sustain cultural pluralism [=], ultimately for the purpose of social transformation.” Further, its stated goal is to, “disrupt the impact of educational inequity and empower students to transform their own lives, their communities, and society.” The course highlights “A Framework for Culturally Responsive & Sustaining Pegagogy [== which includes: “Awareness” that “we all operate within an inequitable system “Cognitive Development” where teachers “leverage students’ identities and interests ...” and “scaffold and develop students’ thinking skills” “Critical Consciousness” where the goal is that students are motivated to “critical action so they can transform their lives, communities, and society.” The course teaches that teachers should focus on collectivism over individualism. In order to promote collectivism, it states that teachers may have to “gather information [] about students’ identities ...” in order to have them reflect. These activities link to a journaling activity [] where students are prompted to write about the demographics of their neighborhood. What this document shows is that yet another school district, under the rubric of critical race theory, wants to use teachers to abuse their positions to turn children into Marxist agitators. Rather than threatening parents, the Justice Department should be investigating this rampant racism being pushed by lefitst extremists in schools across America. JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR DETAILS ON BIDEN ADMINISTRATION SHUT DOWN OF CHINA-COVID INVESTIGATION The Biden State Department shut down a national security investigation into China’s role in the COVID pandemic, and the American people deserve to know why. So we filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of State for records related to an investigation into the origins of COVID by the Bureau of Arms Control and Verification (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of State [==] (No. 1:21-cv-02147)). We sued after the State Department failed to respond to a simple May 28, 2021, FOIA request for: All records regarding the investigation into the origins of the SARS-CoV-2 virus and/or COVID-19 by the Bureau of Arms Control and Verification. This request includes, but is not limited to, the following: All reports created pursuant to the investigation. All related to the actual or proposed termination of the investigation. * All related records of communication between any official, employee, or representative of the Department of State. This includes communications with any official, employee, or representative of the World Health Organization, the government of China, and any branch, agency, department, or office of the Federal government. We took action after reports surfaced that the Biden administration shut down an investigation [] by the State Department’s Bureau of Arms Control and Verification ordered by the Trump administration in Fall 2020 to “investigate the origins of COVID-19 and whether the virus stemmed from a leak out of the Wuhan Institute of Virology in China.” On January 15, then-Secretary of State Michael Pompeo issued a statement [=] saying: The COVID-19 pandemic was avoidable. Any responsible country would have invited world health investigators to Wuhan within days of an outbreak. China instead refused offers of help – including from the United States – and punished brave Chinese doctors, scientists, and journalists who tried to alert the world to the dangers of the virus. Beijing continues today to withhold vital information that scientists need to protect the world from this deadly virus, and the next one. We’ve been very busy investigating burgeoning cover-up by Fauci and his allies: In July 2021, we uncovered [=] emails and other records from the National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases (NIAID) officials in connection with the Wuhan Institute of Virology in Wuhan, China, revealing significant collaborations and funding that began in 2014. The records reveal that NIAID gave nine China-related grants to EcoHealth Alliance [==] to research coronavirus emergence in bats and was the National Institute of Health’s (NIH) top issuer of grants to the Wuhan lab itself. The records also include an email from the Vice Director of the Wuhan Lab asking an NIH official for help finding disinfectants for decontamination of airtight suits and indoor surfaces. Also in July 2021, we uncovered [] CDC records showing that Facebook coordinated closely with the CDC to control the COVID narrative and “misinformation” and that over $3.5 million in free advertising given to the CDC by social media companies. In June 2021, we revealed [=] that the NIAID under Fauci gave the Wuhan lab $826,000 for bat coronavirus research from 2014 to 2019. Also in June, Judicial Watch announced [=] it filed Freedom of FOIA lawsuits against the Office of the Director of National Intelligence (ODNI) and the State Department for information on the Wuhan Institute of Virology and the origins of the SARS-CoV-2 virus. In March 2021, we uncovered [=] emails and other records of Fauci and Dr. H. Clifford Lane from HHS showing that NIH officials tailored confidentiality forms to China’s terms and that the World Health Organization (WHO) conducted an unreleased, “strictly confidential” COVID-19 epidemiological analysis in January 2020. Additionally, the emails reveal an independent journalist in China pointing out the inconsistent COVID numbers in China to NIAID’s Deputy Director for Clinical Research and Special Projects Cliff Lane []. In October 2020, we received from the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services 300 pages [==] of Fauci’s emails, including his approval of a press release supportive of China’s response to the 2019 novel coronavirus. You can see how essential Judicial Watch’s watchdog work is in uncovering the full truth about the origins of COVID-19. And our work isn’t over by a long shot. JUDICIAL WATCH SUES PENTAGON FOR VIDEOS/PHOTOS OF AFGHANS CLINGING TO OR FALLING FROM AIRCRAFT IN KABUL Of course, the Biden administration is running from its Afghanistan disaster, but we intend to hold them to account for the catastrophic surrender. We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the Pentagon for videos and photos of Afghans clinging to or falling off U.S. military aircraft at the Kabul airport. (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Defense [=] (No. 1:21-cv-02543)). We sued after the Defense Department failed to respond to a basic FOIA request for: Images, including video, showing Afghans clinging to the sides of a U.S. military aircraft at the airport in Kabul, Afghanistan; Images, including video, of persons falling from a U.S. Air Force C-17 military transport aircraft after taking off from the airport in Kabul, Afghanistan. Human remains were found in the wheel well of a C-17 aircraft that had taken off from Kabul. According [] to the Air Force, “Before the aircrew could offload the cargo, the aircraft was surrounded by hundreds of Afghan civilians who had breached the airport perimeter. Faced with a rapidly deteriorating security situation around the aircraft, the C-17 crew decided to depart the airfield as quickly as possible. In addition to videos seen online and in press reports, human remains were discovered in the wheel well of the C-17 after it landed at Al Udeid Air Base, Qatar. The aircraft is currently impounded to provide time to collect the remains and inspect the aircraft before it is returned to flying status.” Biden’s Afghanistan surrender was an unmitigated disaster that directly killed and placed in harm’s way our troops and U.S. citizens. And no one will ever forget the images of Afghanis falling from and clinging to our military aircraft. Adding to the Afghan scandal, photos and video of this disaster are now being hidden, contrary to the law, from the American people. And I trust you know that this lawsuit will likely be the first of many as we seek accountability on what I consider to be the most humiliating defeat in American history. JAIL FOR BANGLADESHI SMUGGLER CAUGHT AMID RISE IN MIGRANTS FROM TERRORIST NATIONS Biden’s border crisis has been good business for transnational criminals and the human trafficking operations they run. One such criminal has been apprehended and sent to jail, as our Corruption Chronicles blog reports []. A Bangladeshi man based in Mexico has been sentenced to 46 months in prison [] for operating an “international human smuggling conspiracy” during a period in which the U.S. saw a spike in migrants from terrorist nations entering the country through the famously porous southern border. The smuggler, 41-year-old Mohamad Milon Hossain, lived in Tapachula in the southeast Mexican state of Chiapas bordering Guatemala. For years Hossain assisted human smugglers operating out of Bangladesh, South and Central America as well as Mexico to “bring numerous undocumented individuals to the U.S. border in exchange for payment,” according to federal documents []. The Bangladeshi smuggler maintained a hotel in Tapachula where illegal immigrants would stay on their way to the U.S., federal authorities say. He then provided the migrants with plane tickets and other tools so they could travel from Tapachula to Monterrey in the northeastern Mexican state of Nuevo León where a fellow smuggler took over and assisted their illegal crossing into the U.S. “Hossain was a key facilitator and smuggler of Bangladeshi nationals and his actions put our national security at risk,” said Shane Folden, the Homeland Security Investigations (HSI) special agent in charge in San Antonio, Texas, where the case was cracked. Folden added that “HSI is committed to working with its domestic and international partners to combat this type of crime throughout the globe.” When Hossain got arrested in late 2019 migrants from terrorist nations were trying to enter the United States through Mexico at record rates. At the time an alarming congressional investigation [] exposed an astounding 300% increase in Bangladeshi nationals attempting to sneak into the country through Texas alone. The feds apprehended Hossain after arriving on a flight at George Bush Intercontinental Airport in Houston. He was charged with smuggling 15 illegal aliens from Bangladesh through the Texas-Mexico border in exchange for payment from March 2017 to August 2018. An accomplice, stationed in Monterrey, where the aliens would stay before the last leg of their trek to the United States, has pleaded guilty for his role in the illicit scheme. The feds say he paid drivers to transport the aliens to the U.S. border and gave them instructions how to cross the Rio Grande River. In the last few years Bangladesh has had a greater presence in the Mexican border region though Syria and Yemen are also well represented. Bangladesh is a South-Asian Islamic country well known as a recruiting ground for terrorist groups such as the Islamic State of Iraq and Syria (ISIS) and Al-Qaeda Indian Subcontinent (AQIS). The smuggling operation run by Hossain is part of a broader crisis involving a growing demographic of illegal aliens from terrorist nations entering the U.S. through the Mexican border. The government classifies them as Special Interest Aliens (SIA) and they are flowing north via Latin America in huge numbers, thanks to established Transitional Criminal Organizations (TCO) that facilitate travel along drug and migrant smuggling routes. Tens of thousands of SIAs—from the Middle East, Asia, and Africa—entered Panama and Colombia in recent years. Nearly all the SIA migrants were headed to the United States and most came from Syria, Pakistan, Afghanistan, Somalia, Bangladesh, and India. Encounters with the special interest individuals resulted in the seizure of tens of thousands of fraudulent documents—including passports and visas—that facilitated travel from their countries of origin through the Americas, the previously cited congressional probe [] found. Years ago Judicial Watch, as part of an ongoing investigation into the national security threats created by the porous southern border, uncovered [=] that Mexico is a hotbed of Islamic terrorism. Islamic jihadists are training in southern border towns near American cities and have joined forces with Mexican drug cartels to infiltrate the United States. A few years ago, a high-ranking Homeland Security official confirmed [] to Judicial Watch that Mexican drug traffickers help Islamic terrorists stationed in Mexico cross into the U.S. to explore targets for future attacks. Among the jihadists that traveled back and forth through the southern border was a Kuwaiti named Shaykh Mahmood Omar Khabir, an ISIS operative who lives in the Mexican state of Chihuahua not far from El Paso. Another was a Saudi Al Qaeda operative, Adnan G. El Shurkrjumah, wanted by the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) during his undetected cross-border jaunts. Until next week ... Donald J. Trump October 9th, 2021
The Thursday House hearing of the Arizona Election Scam turned sharply against the Democrats when Congressman Andy Biggs and others started asking questions about all the damning findings of the audit and the people for Maricopa County were unable to give an answer. It was incredible.

They could not answer why they deleted and moved election data after they received a subpoena, or why they have never delivered chain of custody documents for millions of ballots. Congressman Andrew Clyde exposed the Democrats' "Big Lie" that Biden "won" the recount, because no matter how many times you count counterfeit money, "you may have 100 pieces of paper in your pocket, but you sure don't have $100 dollars in legal tender."

The hearing exposed how numerous laws were broken during the Arizona voting, how blank mail-in ballot envelopes were approved, and how there are tens of thousands of suspected fraudulent ballots.

The Fake News, however, refuses to cover those questions and answers because they prove, without question, that we won Arizona (and many other states).

name: Team Fetterman
subject: We’re losing our advantage in PA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Pennsylvania voters have one week.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20211010-2966-header&t=1&akid=2966%2E434096%2EnABbRb)
Hi Peter, it’s Eric here — Deputy Campaign Manager for Team Fetterman.
We talk a lot about the midterms here, and they couldn't be more important. Our campaign is working tirelessly to elect John to the U.S. Senate, to be the 51st vote that we *really* need for Democrats in Congress. We’re not going to stop talking about it leading up to Election Day. But there’s something on our minds:
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32737?t=2&akid=2966%2E434096%2EnABbRb)
As a Pennsylvania voter, you might already know that we have an election this November. From municipal elections to our state judges, the stakes in this election are high for our local and state politics.
**And unfortunately, Peter — I’m here to share with you that as the voter registration deadline looms for the November 2021 election just over a week from today, Monday October 18th, Democrats are losing our advantage in Pennsylvania and in battleground states across the country.**
Over the past few years, Democrats’ voter registration advantage over Republicans has declined in Florida, North Carolina, _and Pennsylvania_ (800,000-plus in 2019 to 600,000-plus today). NBC paints a stark picture:
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32737?t=3&akid=2966%2E434096%2EnABbRb)
****
[**You can see the issue. We’re asking you today, Peter — urgently — to get ready for the November 2021 election by checking your registration status and registering to vote. Make sure that your family and neighbors are registered as well ahead of the Monday, October 18th deadline.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32737?t=4&akid=2966%2E434096%2EnABbRb)
The stakes couldn’t be higher, Peter. We really need to make sure everyone we know is checking their registration status.
**[Register to Vote in PA »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32737?t=5&akid=2966%2E434096%2EnABbRb)**
To keep our ground game strong and to hold the line as we enter into 2022, we have to push — and really take it to the limit — by organizing across all counties in our Commonwealth and registering as many voters as possible. This is how we win.
Thanks for taking this important step, Peter, and see you out there —
Eric
Eric Stern
Deputy Campaign Manager
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211010-2966-footer&t=6&refcode2=2966_434096_nABbRb&akid=2966%2E434096%2EnABbRb)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=7&akid=2966%2E434096%2EnABbRb)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=2966%2E434096%2EnABbRb)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

And unfortunately, Peter — I’m here to share with you that as the voter registration deadline looms for the November 2021 election just over a week from today, Monday October 18th, Democrats are losing our advantage in Pennsylvania and in battleground states across the country. Over the past few years, Democrats’ voter registration advantage over Republicans has declined in Florida, North Carolina, and Pennsylvania (800,000-plus in 2019 to 600,000-plus today). NBC paints a stark picture: ** The stakes couldn’t be higher, Peter. We really need to make sure everyone we know is checking their registration status. To keep our ground game strong and to hold the line as we enter into 2022, we have to push — and really take it to the limit — by organizing across all counties in our Commonwealth and registering as many voters as possible. This is how we win. Thanks for taking this important step, Peter, and see you out there — Eric Eric Stern Deputy Campaign Manager John Fetterman for U.S. Senate | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

subject: Bumping up Kim's message

body:
As a doctor, Kim knows how important access to reproductive health care is. That's why she was proud to help pass the Women's Health Protection Act in the House last month. We wanted to make sure you didn't miss Kim's message, Peter.

As a doctor, Kim knows how important access to reproductive health care is. That's why she was proud to help pass the Women's Health Protection Act in the House last month.

With reproductive rights under attack across the country, the Women's Health Protection Act will codify _Roe v. Wade_ and help ensure everyone has access to the care they need. But first, we need the Senate to pass this critical legislation.

**[If you're with Kim in the fight to defend reproductive rights, add your name to call on the Senate to pass the Women's Health Protection Act.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37393781/310921061/-2138041326?ms=em21_211010_whpa2_adv_gq_act___dks4c_ettx&refcode=em21_211010_whpa2_adv_gq_act___dks4c_ettx&source=em21_211010_whpa2_adv_gq_act___dks4c_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211010_whpa2_adv_gq_act___dks4c_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=3nFSYMtyHXOPTCujHZr0rBNswawQsIKBzzcmbfdFN4S8bDQ3mzclGGsPb%2F463%2BpN80yohONH98yUURj0p30JWWqgWF%2FyyhvHxLmEoHdNu1P2ffy2HL4f4leXPz0ORAmGK9sMQnFprKLc1NfYQWNZGZtJ90Ks3LuU1KqICq3CHuw%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWQ3YWFhNi0wNDJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_-Kiv71et2If06ZeSrxQ3i2SECnhbXFJKUrX6iWIXs0=&emci=564f3915-d426-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=11d7aaa6-042a-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=15820338)**

\---------Begin Forwarded Message----------
From: Dr. Kim Schrier
Subject: Tell the Senate: Pass the Women's Health Protection Act
Date: Thursday, October 7, 2021
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37393782/310921062/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWQ3YWFhNi0wNDJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_-Kiv71et2If06ZeSrxQ3i2SECnhbXFJKUrX6iWIXs0=&emci=564f3915-d426-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=11d7aaa6-042a-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=15820338)
Team,

Republicans in state legislatures across the country are passing restrictive abortion legislation at a record pace. This year alone, 561 abortion restrictions -- and counting -- have been introduced in 47 states, and 97 have already been signed into law. Included in these is Texas' extreme 6 week abortion ban.

Though Texas' ban was temporarily blocked by a federal judge last night, this fight is far from over. We can't afford to wait, that's why my Democratic colleagues in the House and I are taking action to defend reproductive rights.

Last month, I voted to pass the Women's Health Protection Act to protect _Roe v. Wade_ and block states from enacting medically unjustified barriers to accessing abortion care, like waiting periods, unnecessary ultrasounds, hospital admitting privileges, hallway size requirements, and more. Now it is time for the Senate to take action and pass this critical legislation.

**[Will you add your name right away to call on the Senate to pass the Women's Health Protection Act?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37393783/310921063/-2138041326?ms=em21_211010_whpa2_adv_gq_act___dks4c_ettx&refcode=em21_211010_whpa2_adv_gq_act___dks4c_ettx&source=em21_211010_whpa2_adv_gq_act___dks4c_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211010_whpa2_adv_gq_act___dks4c_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=3nFSYMtyHXOPTCujHZr0rBNswawQsIKBzzcmbfdFN4S8bDQ3mzclGGsPb%2F463%2BpN80yohONH98yUURj0p30JWWqgWF%2FyyhvHxLmEoHdNu1P2ffy2HL4f4leXPz0ORAmGK9sMQnFprKLc1NfYQWNZGZtJ90Ks3LuU1KqICq3CHuw%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWQ3YWFhNi0wNDJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_-Kiv71et2If06ZeSrxQ3i2SECnhbXFJKUrX6iWIXs0=&emci=564f3915-d426-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=11d7aaa6-042a-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=15820338)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37393784/310921064/-2138041326?ms=em21_211010_whpa2_adv_gq_act___dks4c_ettx&refcode=em21_211010_whpa2_adv_gq_act___dks4c_ettx&source=em21_211010_whpa2_adv_gq_act___dks4c_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211010_whpa2_adv_gq_act___dks4c_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=3nFSYMtyHXOPTCujHZr0rBNswawQsIKBzzcmbfdFN4S8bDQ3mzclGGsPb%2F463%2BpN80yohONH98yUURj0p30JWWqgWF%2FyyhvHxLmEoHdNu1P2ffy2HL4f4leXPz0ORAmGK9sMQnFprKLc1NfYQWNZGZtJ90Ks3LuU1KqICq3CHuw%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWQ3YWFhNi0wNDJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_-Kiv71et2If06ZeSrxQ3i2SECnhbXFJKUrX6iWIXs0=&emci=564f3915-d426-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=11d7aaa6-042a-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=15820338)

By refusing to block Texas' abortion ban, the Supreme Court left the door open for other states to enact similar laws. It's only a matter of time before we see even more attacks on reproductive rights, so we need to take action to ensure that women, not state legislators, make their own healthcare decisions.

As the only pro-choice woman doctor in the House, I will always fight back against any attacks on _Roe_. I need to know you're with me in this important fight.

**[If you agree that everyone should have access to the reproductive care they need, no matter where they live, add your name to call on the Senate to pass the Women's Health Protection Act.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37393785/310921065/-2138041326?ms=em21_211010_whpa2_adv_gq_act___dks4c_ettx&refcode=em21_211010_whpa2_adv_gq_act___dks4c_ettx&source=em21_211010_whpa2_adv_gq_act___dks4c_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211010_whpa2_adv_gq_act___dks4c_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=3nFSYMtyHXOPTCujHZr0rBNswawQsIKBzzcmbfdFN4S8bDQ3mzclGGsPb%2F463%2BpN80yohONH98yUURj0p30JWWqgWF%2FyyhvHxLmEoHdNu1P2ffy2HL4f4leXPz0ORAmGK9sMQnFprKLc1NfYQWNZGZtJ90Ks3LuU1KqICq3CHuw%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWQ3YWFhNi0wNDJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_-Kiv71et2If06ZeSrxQ3i2SECnhbXFJKUrX6iWIXs0=&emci=564f3915-d426-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=11d7aaa6-042a-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=15820338)**

Thank you,

Kim

There’s nothing more important to me than my family.

My daughter was born prematurely and spent her first days in the NICU — while Don Bacon voted against the Affordable Care Act.

But if you’re short on time, will you chip in $10 now to support him? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37395380/310926465/1129282168?refcode=20211010_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs_v1&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGUyZmQ2YS0wYzJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v0vS5s8ItVEnfeavVmLwQgVljQosKf0DiNA29pq6yFI=)

— Knocking on doors to meet voters
— Connecting with local businesses and community organizations
— Raising money to keep his campaign running
— _On top of helping me raise our two young kids!_
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37395381/310926466/1129282168?refcode=20211010_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs_v1&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGUyZmQ2YS0wYzJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v0vS5s8ItVEnfeavVmLwQgVljQosKf0DiNA29pq6yFI=)
That's just how Tony is.

[**_When Tony believes in something, he doesn’t stop until he gets the job done. And right now, I know in my heart that our neighbors need a fighter like Tony in Congress. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37395382/310926467/1129282168?refcode=20211010_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs_v1&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGUyZmQ2YS0wYzJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v0vS5s8ItVEnfeavVmLwQgVljQosKf0DiNA29pq6yFI=)

Like Tony, I’ve dedicated my life to public service.

I started out as a Special Education teacher and decided to go to law school so I could do more to help my students and their families.

Now I run a local non-profit dedicated to helping families with children with disabilities get the support they need to be successful at school.

Tony and I are both driven by a mission to help others, in whatever way we can.

That’s the kind of representation that our neighbors deserve from their Congressman.

Don Bacon has acted against the best interests of our community so many times, with his votes to repeal access to affordable healthcare and cut taxes for billionaires and wealthy corporations.

After Tony’s dad passed away from COVID-19 and Bacon voted against COVID relief when Nebraskans needed it most, [**_I knew that Tony was the right person to replace him._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37395383/310926469/1129282168?refcode=20211010_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs_v1&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGUyZmQ2YS0wYzJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v0vS5s8ItVEnfeavVmLwQgVljQosKf0DiNA29pq6yFI=)

[**_Tony has shown us he is the leader that our community and our families need and deserve. But Don Bacon already has over $420,000 lined up to stop Tony from winning. I know if anyone can catch up and flip this seat, it’s Tony -- but only if he can hit his $10,381 goal before his End-of-Week Deadline. I’m personally asking: will you chip in $10 now? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37395384/310926470/1129282168?refcode=20211010_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs_v1&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGUyZmQ2YS0wYzJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v0vS5s8ItVEnfeavVmLwQgVljQosKf0DiNA29pq6yFI=)

But if Tony misses his $10,381 goal, he’ll have to make serious budget cuts to his campaign that will hurt his chances of winning.

This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream.

This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue.

body:
Let me explain:

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37395691/310927409/691946420?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTM3ZTAwNy0wZDJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r3D5PMdQX0Zvp010vUviH4npNTGyHRJwM4xjvfDvK-g=)
---
Peter, I can hardly believe we are nearing the end of this campaign.

As I look back on the incredible work we’ve done — _knocking doors, listening to the needs of Virginia’s working families, and fighting to keep our Democratic majority alive_ — I’m reminded of what this is all about.

**This campaign is about “we”, not me.**

[**I’ll explain in a moment, Peter, but first can I count on you to chip in $3? We’re less than one month away from Election Day, and every dollar gets us that much closer to winning this race. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37395692/310927412/-1547699132?amount=3&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=HAFV_20211010_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTM3ZTAwNy0wZDJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r3D5PMdQX0Zvp010vUviH4npNTGyHRJwM4xjvfDvK-g=) | [CONTRIBUTE $3, THEN KEEP READING! »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37395693/310927413/-1547699132?amount=3&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=HAFV_20211010_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTM3ZTAwNy0wZDJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r3D5PMdQX0Zvp010vUviH4npNTGyHRJwM4xjvfDvK-g=)
---
As I said, Peter, this campaign is about more than just me.

I’m running to keep all Virginians in mind. Together, with our Democratic majorities, we’ve gotten so much inspiring work done — _we expanded Medicaid, fought for gun safety reform, passed the ERA, and so much more._

**And if you elect me as Virginia’s Lt. Governor, I’ll continue this great work on behalf of you and every Virginian.**

I know the nature of my election would be historic as the first woman and first Afro‐Latina to ever hold the Lt. Governor’s office — but this is about all of us. **It’s about how representation in government opens doors and gives us a more diverse future.**

[**So if you’re with me, Peter, I hope you will chip in just $3 to my campaign today to see this through. name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Sign the No Forced COVID Vax Open Letter
body:
By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zaflpekd1o54hdbup113kfmm0295kqfkpr26tsfo_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c3ie9or4c5h2bs) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA’s National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zo8350s39pk3g33qvhpijbr3rkl35556cl55tafo_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c3ie9or4c5h2bs) [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z5kq0ju22fe9qk3b2ojvg6njus9pnsus4ltnsav0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c3ie9or4c5h2bs) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a **“NO FORCED VAX”** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zidpd4nm057s3av6iit5bg09vu3eaemehp3hq12g_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c3ie9or4c5h2bs) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students —the least affected by the disease — must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you’ll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z8nimon4vg6e768ijtn0rilvucdp7ofbh06b3vo8_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c3ie9or4c5h2bs) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zf8jnoesf39j1iu16lbfkbmuio0okqbraddbo50o_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c3ie9or4c5h2bs) Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

clean_body: By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has NO POWER to get involved in your medical decisions. PERIOD! But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are FORCING students to get the COVID vaccine... DEMANDING that they publicly share their medical history... and BANNING them from school if they don’t comply! My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a “NO FORCED VAX” campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. This move by the universities is not about vaccines AT ALL. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students —the least affected by the disease — must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his ONLINE college classes until he takes the vaccine! If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next! We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. Thank you for your support! body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=21d74ec1edc26f6f3e558ac3a941ee2305b9090342838ebe46de6593cbb1deeef237b1263d0abf754ed80b6588dbdc2745d03c9d74ee36974c32a54b2152b07f68c54231ee42017b

Peter,

Governor DeSantis just got a MAJOR victory in his fight to keep Florida free!

Politicians in the city of Gainesville were attempting to violate Florida’s ban on vaccine passports by mandating that all Gainesville public employees get vaccinated or lose their jobs.

Even though first responders worked throughout the pandemic and even though many have immunity through prior infection, Gainesville was set to fire them over COVID shots, effectively kicking them to the curb.

This political power grab did NOT fly with Governor DeSantis. He stepped in to protect Floridians from government overreach that threatened the jobs and livelihoods with oppressive and nonsensical mandates.

Last Friday, the city of Gainesville REVERSED their illegal mandate in a MASSIVE victory for the jobs of our first responders and for individual freedom.

Governor DeSantis will ALWAYS be committed to protecting the rights and freedoms of Floridians and he will continue pursuing more victories for liberty.

Thank you for your continued support,

Team DeSantis

name: John Fetterman
subject: STRIKE!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Tony the Tiger and Kellogg’s cereals are among the most recognizable figures in American consumerism.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20211010-2968-header&t=1&akid=2968%2E434096%2EuAZVtm)
Peter,
**As you read this, more than 1,400 Kellogg’s workers across the country are on strike for a fair contract.** It was a deep *honor* to join our BCTGM Local 374G on the picket line yesterday in Lancaster, PA.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32626?t=2&akid=2968%2E434096%2EuAZVtm)
In today’s world, it’s so easy to pull the ladder up after you. But I can’t think of a finer definition of solidarity than older BCTGM union members putting it all on the line and going on strike for up-and-coming BCTGM union members. That’s just remarkable.
Look, Tony the Tiger and Kellogg’s cereals are among the most recognizable figures in American consumerism. But you know what? They’re _grrrrreedy_.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32626?t=3&akid=2968%2E434096%2EuAZVtm)
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32626?t=4&akid=2968%2E434096%2EuAZVtm)
In the past year and a half, Kellogg’s posted record earnings + authorized 1.5 billion in stock buybacks to line their shareholders’ pockets.
And now corporate executives want to cry poor while the next generation of union workers break their backs feeding America? That’s just bullsh*t.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32626?t=5&akid=2968%2E434096%2EuAZVtm)
Let me be very clear: Kellogg’s workers deserve a fair contract + benefits NOW.
What’s more, we gotta eliminate the Senate filibuster in order to pass the PRO Act + a $15 minimum wage. And remember, that’s just the floor — not the ceiling.
**Bottom line, Peter, the Union Way of Life is sacred to me, and protecting workers' rights and organized labor is one of my highest priorities.** I will always stand in solidarity with workers. I hope you will, too.
In solidarity,
John
P.S. Our BCTGM Local 374G, from the Kellogg’s plant in Lancaster, PA, are currently on the picket lines. These members need our help + support, so I have to ask: [**_Can you please chip in and support BCTGM Local 374G as they strike for a fair contract? Any amount you're able to give goes towards supplies for the members that are walking the line. Thank you._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32626?t=6&akid=2968%2E434096%2EuAZVtm) 🙏
**[Donate](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32626?t=7&akid=2968%2E434096%2EuAZVtm)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211010-2968-footer&t=8&refcode2=2968_434096_uAZVtm&akid=2968%2E434096%2EuAZVtm)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=9&akid=2968%2E434096%2EuAZVtm)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=2968%2E434096%2EuAZVtm)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Sign the No Forced COVID Vax Open Letter
body:
By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8889%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=sF6gs2EmeSbvIY1WMArGVw&sysid=1)
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15906%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=l8FZwLrgF0KoN8UcSUQ%2frg&sysid=1) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA’s National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15907%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ksALUwYAo7A3aazgz6BJoA&sysid=1) [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15906%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=l8FZwLrgF0KoN8UcSUQ%2frg&sysid=1) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a **“NO FORCED VAX”** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15908%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ntL4CnoSyTRnZ6yQG9%2bXWg&sysid=1) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students --the least affected by the disease -- must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you’ll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15909%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BWAZaURYHkHzHSl1l3rm%2bg&sysid=1) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15900%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EdglM8tt5FDgfTEYbSoexQ&sysid=1) Thank you for your support! name: Powered By People (BetoORourke.com)
subject: We want to talk about some numbers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

We know that a lot of the time when we talk about what our movement has
accomplished, we have really big numbers to show for it like 250,000 new
registered voters and 76 million voter contacts.

But today, we want to talk about something different: Our work on six
college campuses to register a historic number of students to vote.

Here's what's so important about this: Texas has one of the
largest populations of young people in the country — and their turnout
could be the key to making the change we want to see in Texas. Every new
Student Fellow and new voter brings us one step closer to turning Texas
blue — and these numbers are just the start!

It's one of the reasons the Texas GOP has been fighting so hard to
restrict the right to vote. SB 1, the extreme voter suppression bill
signed into law by Governor Abbott last month, has specific restrictions
on early voting, mail-in ballot applications, and ID requirements for
voting-by-mail that directly impact students' ability to vote.

Our
Student Fellows are doing the work now to build a better, more responsive
government and to elect leaders that truly represent the people of Texas.
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/47049?refcode=ema20211010-157580&t=1001&akid=157580%2E444211%2EA-SKy_ ]Please, donate $3 or more to support our Student
Fellows' work to register new voters, fight against voter suppression, and
protect our democracy.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/47049?refcode=ema20211010-157580&amount=3&t=1020&akid=157580%2E444211%2EA-SKy_ ]Contribute $3

Take a moment to learn more about this work from our Student Fellow
Organizing Manager, MacKenzie Jenkins:

"From the time I have been eligible to vote, I have observed many efforts
to intimidate and dissuade voter engagement, especially with young people,
people of color, and voters with disabilities. My hope is that minority
voters across Texas will continue to use voting as an important tool in
ensuring our officials value not just our vote, but our voice too.

It is really encouraging registering new voters, and seeing them become
excited about the power they have in voting for people who they believe
will positively influence their local community and state. At almost every
voter registration event there is at least one student who will say, 'I'm
going to call my mom and tell her I got registered to vote!' You can
really feel their excitement and it is heartening to see the impact of
this work so closely."

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/47049?refcode=ema20211010-157580&t=1021&akid=157580%2E444211%2EA-SKy_ ]Powered by People is committed to
registering hundreds of thousands of new voters in Texas wherever they are
— on college campuses, at community centers, even at their doorsteps.
Please, chip in now to support our work to turn out the most voters Texas
has ever seen and elect Democrats in 2022 and beyond.

Thank you,

Powered by People

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/47049?refcode=ema20211010-157580&t=1022&akid=157580%2E444211%2EA-SKy_ ]Donate »

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=157580%2E444211%2EA-SKy_

But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. If you’re with me, = Thank you so much. – Marco Lopez | | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Marco Lopez for Governor PO Box 34672 Phoenix, AZ 85067 United States | | 2021 | Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez
