We want to surprise him with a card from everyone on Team Skarlatos, including you Peter! Right now, Alek is laser-focused on becoming one of the first Republican candidates for office this cycle to gain entry into the coveted “Young Guns” program through the RNC., which will give our campaign the needed support to flip this targeted Oregon seat RED! So, there’s no way he’s going to take a break to celebrate. so we can surprise him while he’s hard at work campaigning to win for the GOP. clean_body: | | | Derek, we’ve got some troubling news: Virginia was just rated a TOSS-UP by The Cook Political Report.And it's October already. They downgraded Democrats' chances of winning, and they’re giving extremist Trump Republicans a 50-50 shot at winning the Virginia Governor’s office. This is the most important race of 2021, and it’s going to set the stage for not just the 2022 midterms but for Donald Trump’s attempt at a comeback in 2024. We can’t let Virginia fall, Derek, but with Virginians headed to the polls right now and Election Day in just a couple weeks, that looks more possible every single day. \-- Common Good VA | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . name: Dr Neil Shah
subject: Walz Can Be Beat
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Dr
body:
| [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_can_be_beat&n=1) Peter, Polls show that Tim Walz’s approval ratings are dropping alongside the numbers of the disastrous Joe Biden presidency. For the first time in his first (and only) term as Governor, Walz has fallen below 50%. This race CAN be won! **But the crowd of candidates is full of career politicians who are more concerned with adding “governor” to their resume than they are about saving Minnesota. They can’t win. That’s why we need to go a different direction - we must have an outsider with a different playbook.** I have no interest in being a politician. I’m a family man, physician and successful business owner. My priority is to protect your liberty and advance the conservative agenda as Governor, then go back to my life in the private sector. Like you, I want to Save Minnesota for future generations. Tim Walz is beatable! So we must get our message out. Our team continues to travel the state with our message of liberty and making sure endless emergency powers and vaccine mandates never happen again! Last Thursday, we were in Brainerd speaking to the Cass County Republicans.
[](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6rdu3t7F11lVK5qeu9KzziW-iZHTiGrZSnnrAZl5V3tk&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_can_be_beat&n=2) **Stay in touch with us and learn how we’re different than the other candidates. Find out where we’re heading next by following our**[**Facebook page**](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6rdu3t7F11lVK5qeu9KzziW-iZHTiGrZSnnrAZl5V3tk&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_can_be_beat&n=3)**. And if you like our message of health freedom, please**[**support the campaign**](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_can_be_beat&n=4)**. We’re not funded by lobbyists and special interests like the career politician candidates.** Let’s Fire Time Walz and take back our state! **Thank you!** **** Sincerely, Dr. Neil Shah Conservative Candidate for Governor [http://www.electneil.com/](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_can_be_beat&n=5) Prepared and paid for by the Dr. Neil Shah for Governor Committee, 855 Village Center Dr #245, North Oaks, MN 55127
---

Friend,
I love Alaska!
I’m from here, played ice hockey here, went to school here and am raising my family here. My parents went from homeless to the working class when my mom got an oil job. That job changed our lives.
We’ve worked tirelessly to give our kids a great Alaska life and an opportunity at the American Dream. But thanks to Liberal Lisa Murkowski, all that we’ve worked so hard for is quickly vanishing.
When Lisa teamed up with Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, I knew she was choosing to throw away the Alaskan way of life. And now look--our economy is annihilated, our jobs are destroyed, and our liberty is loathed and limited.

clean_body: | | | | It’s time we take back our Country Friend, I love Alaska! I’m from here, played ice hockey here, went to school here and am raising my family here. My parents went from homeless to the working class when my mom got an oil job. That job changed our lives. We’ve worked tirelessly to give our kids a great Alaska life and an opportunity at the American Dream. But thanks to Liberal Lisa Murkowski, all that we’ve worked so hard for is quickly vanishing. When Lisa teamed up with Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, I knew she was choosing to throw away the Alaskan way of life. And now look--our economy is annihilated, our jobs are destroyed, and our liberty is loathed and limited. I am running for the U.S. Senate because we deserve fresh leadership that will fight not only for you, but for America. I will call out the Swamp and the Insiders, I will cut spending and I will care for our community. Thanks, Kelly | | | | ==

subject: I know it’s late, but I have to ask a final time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
match expiring
| |
---
| | Derek, I know it’s late, but I wanted to make sure you got one last reminder to _**[make a matched contribution and help me hit my midnight $400,000 weekend goal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37403451/310968420/-2023814932?refcode=20211010.8_TM_10BZ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDA3ZTJiZi0zMjJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FnKcmRA1t2RHsteiON3DCXa-Xm9jm_x0e30H9N2atT8=)**_ — we’re still $8,500 or so short, and your contribution could be the one that puts us over the top.

Look, I’ll level with you: sometimes, I get worried about the state of this race. Polls are dangerously close, Glenn is outraising us, and there’s so much on the line.

I mean, we’re fighting to defend voting rights, protect reproductive rights, support working families and invest in education — and our opponent is a far-right culture warrior who wants to ban abortion and roll back Virginia’s progress.

He’s spreading anti-vaccine rhetoric _and_ he said **he’d vote for Donald Trump in 2024 at our last debate.**

The stakes are really, really high, Derek.

So tonight, it’s really important that we hit our fundraising goal — and I hope you’ll make a matched contribution to help us get there. Remember: if you chip in before midnight, your impact will be doubled by an anonymous supporter.

To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | | | | | We were GUTTED when Trump’s Supreme Court Justices (including Brett Kavanaugh) ruled that Texas could practically outright ban abortion. And we were EVEN MORE gutted when we realized that the only reason Kavanaugh is on the court is because the FBI allegedly faked an investigation into him in 2018! | | | Thanks for representing Democrats in your area! \-- Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? ---
Traveling the state, I hear so many reasons why Wisconsinites want new leadership in Washington. But for a lot of politicians, the concerns they learn about on the road go in one ear and out the other. That’s just not how I do things.

From the start, I’ve built my public service on listening as much as I talk and delivering real results for the people of our state. So I’ve been listening to folks across Wisconsin since the beginning of this journey -- going places Democrats don’t always go, having important conversations about what's going on in every community, and asking how I can help.

My top priority is to make sure we’re not leaving anyone behind as we build this campaign from the ground up, which is why I have been so focused on setting an agenda that’s actually tailored to our state.

Look, I know there aren’t always events near you, or the timing may not work out sometimes, but that’s why I send these brief surveys around. It’s important that I hear from you and get your feedback as we head into the final months of the year.

**[So, if you have a minute, fill in this quick survey to share your thoughts with me. I want to know what issues you’ve been thinking about lately and how I can help, and then let’s stand together in the fights ahead to get results.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37403822/310969112/-1419572481?ms=em21_211010_survey_esrv_gq_act_kic_sg_ettx&refcode=em21_211010_survey_esrv_gq_act_kic_sg_ettx&source=em21_211010_survey_esrv_gq_act_kic_sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211010_survey_esrv_gq_act_kic_sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=hdAWOaBuunegtIgtj1sg6NChJKfjLupGBmBkM24kz2kQ1fZRDg83KQHdFklxM1fDjfNfMhaDy6FV9FHdYUOAurRDCZOOK5zjknoxDig0VdAjSG1x%2B8aNzIcPIpEUiLKu%2B9nT9Azpk5q3x6ciobcqAqiAq6nsI9%2FjCl0Y%2Fz5hYt4%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmU1Y2FiOS0zNTJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rJN918uHm2XO6e94NTA4v9QNHQ3Ig0bVOH4QxW3_ZNQ=&emci=d4e2ce3a-6728-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=c6e5cab9-352a-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=18659593)**
[Take the Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37403823/310969113/-1419572481?ms=em21_211010_survey_esrv_gq_act_kic_sg_ettx&refcode=em21_211010_survey_esrv_gq_act_kic_sg_ettx&source=em21_211010_survey_esrv_gq_act_kic_sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211010_survey_esrv_gq_act_kic_sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=hdAWOaBuunegtIgtj1sg6NChJKfjLupGBmBkM24kz2kQ1fZRDg83KQHdFklxM1fDjfNfMhaDy6FV9FHdYUOAurRDCZOOK5zjknoxDig0VdAjSG1x%2B8aNzIcPIpEUiLKu%2B9nT9Azpk5q3x6ciobcqAqiAq6nsI9%2FjCl0Y%2Fz5hYt4%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmU1Y2FiOS0zNTJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rJN918uHm2XO6e94NTA4v9QNHQ3Ig0bVOH4QxW3_ZNQ=&emci=d4e2ce3a-6728-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=c6e5cab9-352a-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=18659593)
---
We have an incredible opportunity to put this seat back to work for Wisconsin, but that kind of progress will only be accomplished if we work together and listen to one another. While I wish I could sit down and grab a cold beer with you (or a beverage of your choice!) to hear your thoughts, the next best way for me to know what’s on your mind is by sending you this message.

I look forward to reading your response. Talk soon.

— Sarah

P.S. Feel free to forward this email to your friends or family members, and let’s see if we can reach a few more people!

Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin

From the start, I’ve built my public service on listening as much as I talk and delivering real results for the people of our state. So I’ve been listening to folks across Wisconsin since the beginning of this journey -- going places Democrats don’t always go, having important conversations about what's going on in every community, and asking how I can help. My top priority is to make sure we’re not leaving anyone behind as we build this campaign from the ground up, which is why I have been so focused on setting an agenda that’s actually tailored to our state. Look, I know there aren’t always events near you, or the timing may not work out sometimes, but that’s why I send these brief surveys around. It’s important that I hear from you and get your feedback as we head into the final months of the year. We have an incredible opportunity to put this seat back to work for Wisconsin, but that kind of progress will only be accomplished if we work together and listen to one another. While I wish I could sit down and grab a cold beer with you (or a beverage of your choice!) to hear your thoughts, the next best way for me to know what’s on your mind is by sending you this message. I look forward to reading your response. Talk soon. — Sarah P.S. Feel free to forward this email to your friends or family members, and let’s see if we can reach a few more people! Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin Sarah for Wisconsin PO Box 166 Madison, WI 53701 United States

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: [ADD YOUR NAME] Stop utility shutoffs!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
I’m proud to support Representative Rashida Tlaib’s legislation to stop utility shutoffs and eliminate household debt for essential services. Will you join me?
#
Millions of Americans are falling behind on their bills during this ongoing crisis. This kind of debt can snowball and lead to evictions or shutoffs of vital services like clean water, gas and electricity, and internet. **[But if we pass my friend Rashida Tlaib’s Maintaining Access to Essential Services Act, we can stop utility shutoffs and eliminate household debt for these essential services. Add your name to support this legislation today:](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/7570?t=1&akid=710%2E420207%2E6bsyGJ)** **[Add your name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/7570?t=2&akid=710%2E420207%2E6bsyGJ)**
---
No one in this country should have to worry about whether they can reliably access electricity, clean water, or broadband internet, Peter.
But all across America, millions of families are struggling to afford the skyrocketing prices of these essential services. Mounting debt for unpaid bills has brought families to the brink of experiencing homelessness. And people who can’t afford their utility bills are punished through shutoffs of these vital, life-sustaining services, making it impossible to meet their basic needs.
**There’s a solution: My colleague and friend, Representative Rashida Tlaib introduced the Maintaining Access to Essential Services Act.** The bill will stop utility shutoffs, require reconnection for anyone whose essential services have been shut off, and eliminate household debt for water, electricity, and broadband internet — and I’m proud to be a co-sponsor of this vital legislation.
**[Let’s show everyone that there’s real momentum behind this bill to get it to President Biden’s desk. Will you add your name now to our petition in support of the Maintaining Access to Essential Services Act?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/7570?t=3&akid=710%2E420207%2E6bsyGJ)**
**[Add your name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/7570?t=4&akid=710%2E420207%2E6bsyGJ)**
Even before the pandemic, millions of people across the country were going without running water — a basic human need and a right — simply because they couldn’t afford to pay for it. And this punitive system disproportionately harms Black, brown, and low-income people.
To address this growing crisis, the Maintaining Access to Essential Services Act provides nearly $40 billion in low-interest loans to utilities — and requires them to: suspend utility shutoffs (water, power, and internet), restore disconnected service, suspend late fees and charges, stop the sale of household debt to debt collectors, and stop filing adverse reports to credit agencies.
The loans will be forgiven when the utilities forgive all outstanding household debt. **That’s how we can eliminate mounting debt for millions of struggling families and begin to break the cycle of poverty.**
**[In this crisis and beyond, we must ensure that people can remain in their homes with their water running and their lights on. Add your name now in support of Rashida Tlaib’s Maintaining Access to Essential Services Act.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/7570?t=5&akid=710%2E420207%2E6bsyGJ)**
**[Add your name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/7570?t=6&akid=710%2E420207%2E6bsyGJ)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20211010-710-footer&t=7&refcode2=710_420207_6bsyGJ&akid=710%2E420207%2E6bsyGJ)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=8&akid=710%2E420207%2E6bsyGJ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=710%2E420207%2E6bsyGJ)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress
